body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970370:J0V-YbGNU:m:1:3317145305:E841DAC455DA5849210976017410ADA4:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970370:J0V-YbGNU:m:1:3317145305:E841DAC455DA5849210976017410ADA4:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970370:J0V-YbGNU:m:1:3317145305:E841DAC455DA5849210976017410ADA4:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970370:J0V-YbGNU:m:1:3317145305:E841DAC455DA5849210976017410ADA4:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970370:J0V-YbGNU:m:1:3317145305:E841DAC455DA5849210976017410ADA4:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970370:J0V-YbGNU:m:1:3317145305:E841DAC455DA5849210976017410ADA4:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970370:J0V-YbGNU:m:1:3317145305:E841DAC455DA5849210976017410ADA4:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970371:J0V-YbGNU:m:1:3317145305:E841DAC455DA5849210976017410ADA4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970372:J0V-YbGNU:m:1:3317145305:E841DAC455DA5849210976017410ADA4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970373:J0V-YbGNU:m:1:3317145305:E841DAC455DA5849210976017410ADA4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970374:J0V-YbGNU:m:1:3317145305:E841DAC455DA5849210976017410ADA4:r)

name: American Briefing
subject: Reserve your place in the study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3bslnr89rq7deom0pvce5ee5mvo7is8f7tnha5o_rp22sh2s8i66or4slimao74c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0mcvpjalrv3dggbvfsvtqi8mguoehn5ievoci5g_rp22sh2s8i66or4slimao74c3h2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: ConservativeFWD on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: C.S. Lewis like you’ve never seen him before
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuuc5boo9bs9uk7lcu2gqfl6so4anp3v060hmle8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sjlm2r31odhmuom4t73cth69cthclgm3crgcli74cllm2q3adpie8rr1pb2esrrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32d5l6go74dr664qb6p37m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm6p75cljm6p30s8iv0)
*Sponsored Message*
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6ojqrb3ofac3ui62utpf7dofvqd0djj3euv9teg_rp22sh2s8i66or4slimeor4c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8kbhfni0dt5cbu7l07u9c03ug0ifl639hi4gli8_rp22sh2s8i66or4slimeor4c3h2bs)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcu6dbhufnti2i1q7mrevgv4c73dbpt6qg8lnfu0_rp22sh2s8i66or4slimeor4c3h2bs)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zipscim459rb73fg0958q1cba06lcv8q65q6ob1g_rp22sh2s8i66or4slimeor4c3h2bs) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgf993u6jk340oeq5p64sscjj7kjjmj5n73nkkeg_rp22sh2s8i66or4slimeor4c3h2bs)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp4bspotd7gu0gble18cbijpf8uf50jjl47m9hs8_rp22sh2s8i66or4slimeor4c3h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Your America
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6492%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=Uy4MjJCalL66L1RMTPK7zw&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84895%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n65cuUAKSrYcS8ke%2f6jVKg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_“Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” - Tammy from Georgia_

_“The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” - Bob from Colorado_

_“It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE -starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84896%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aDNYWTWR%2ft1gzPABrOywrw&sysid=1)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:
|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970733:JJoNlbGNp:m:1:3373497171:8C5F77FFB0272C2390B9731F9FB20D9C:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970733:JJoNlbGNp:m:1:3373497171:8C5F77FFB0272C2390B9731F9FB20D9C:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970733:JJoNlbGNp:m:1:3373497171:8C5F77FFB0272C2390B9731F9FB20D9C:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970733:JJoNlbGNp:m:1:3373497171:8C5F77FFB0272C2390B9731F9FB20D9C:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970733:JJoNlbGNp:m:1:3373497171:8C5F77FFB0272C2390B9731F9FB20D9C:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Biden Administration Accountability Project
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
Dear Peter,

**_The time you and I have been waiting for is here._**

Have you heard? Now that the GOP has taken back the House, we will fully investigate the Biden Regime!

And first up is Biden's Open Borders DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas!

**[Can I count on you to donate $25 to help me hold the Biden Regime accountable](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61187501:WxeHFrDN0:m:1:2365227053:CDB9701DF259955B758C7EC85D8CDF27:r)?** [**-> INVESTIGATE THE BIDEN REGIME <-**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61187501:WxeHFrDN0:m:1:2365227053:CDB9701DF259955B758C7EC85D8CDF27:r) **I sure hope you can and will right away.**

The radical Biden Regime is hell-bent on destroying our nation's economy, the criminal justice system, sovereignty, foreign policy, and the very Constitution on which we were founded.

Now the newly elected Republican House will investigate Joe Biden and his corrupt comrades.

And to kick off the investigations, we will call Secretary Mayorkas to the Judiciary Committee to ask him the questions all Americans want to know - like why he has allowed the INVASION of the United States.

_But to keep the pressure on to keep the investigations going, I must raise $28,000 in the next week_.

With your help, we will demand that Joe Biden and his comrades be fully investigated and prosecuted for their crimes against all Americans.

**With your donations, we will expose Biden's Open Borders policies that have made the Southern Border a hotbed of criminal activity like arms smuggling, drug smuggling, and even terrorist activity.**

**[That's why I hope you will join me with a contribution right away of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or $250](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61187501:WxeHFrDN0:m:1:2365227053:CDB9701DF259955B758C7EC85D8CDF27:r).** [**JOIN THE FIGHT TO INVESTIGATE THE BIDEN REGIME**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61187501:WxeHFrDN0:m:1:2365227053:CDB9701DF259955B758C7EC85D8CDF27:r) I am not going to let this historic opportunity pass us by. I will do everything in my power to investigate the Biden Crime Family, the Biden Administration, and the DHS Secretary who has allowed so much damage under his watch.

Damage like increased human trafficking, the fentanyl crisis, the launch of the Soviet-style "Ministry of Truth," and the grotesque "domestic terrorist" label his agency has placed on concerned parents.

**[Please help us thoroughly investigate Secretary Mayorkas and the entire Biden Regime with your contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61187501:WxeHFrDN0:m:1:2365227053:CDB9701DF259955B758C7EC85D8CDF27:r).**

**Thanks for not backing down!** [**INVESTIGATE THE BIDEN REGIME
CHIP IN BELOW TODAY**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61187501:WxeHFrDN0:m:1:2365227053:CDB9701DF259955B758C7EC85D8CDF27:r) [** CHIP IN $10 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61187501:WxeHFrDN0:m:1:2365227053:CDB9701DF259955B758C7EC85D8CDF27:r) [** CHIP IN $17.76 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61187501:WxeHFrDN0:m:1:2365227053:CDB9701DF259955B758C7EC85D8CDF27:r) [** CHIP IN $25 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61187501:WxeHFrDN0:m:1:2365227053:CDB9701DF259955B758C7EC85D8CDF27:r) [** CHIP IN $50 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61187501:WxeHFrDN0:m:1:2365227053:CDB9701DF259955B758C7EC85D8CDF27:r) [** CHIP IN $100 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61187501:WxeHFrDN0:m:1:2365227053:CDB9701DF259955B758C7EC85D8CDF27:r) [** CHIP IN $250 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61187501:WxeHFrDN0:m:1:2365227053:CDB9701DF259955B758C7EC85D8CDF27:r) [** CHIP IN NOW >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61187501:WxeHFrDN0:m:1:2365227053:CDB9701DF259955B758C7EC85D8CDF27:r) _Sincerely,_

body:
BREAKING: Jan. 6 committee votes to subpoena Trump!!
| **BREAKING: Jan. 6 committee votes to subpoena Trump**

**FIRST:** The January 6th Committee held their first public hearing to expose Donald Trump’s treasonous crimes on Jan. 6th, 2021.

**THEN:** The committee voted to SUBPOENA Donald Trump for his crimes.. _AMAZING!!_

**NOW:** We need to send the Jan. 6th Committee a HUGE thank you note for their brave work.

[**We're sending a HUGE Thank You card to the January 6th Committee and we need your signature! We have 460 more spots open for Democrats in your state to sign – don’t wait, sign right now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/36198?t=6&akid=5601%2E878179%2EsmdFs_) | [DONATE $5 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/36198?t=7&akid=5601%2E878179%2EsmdFs_)

To: The January 6th Committee
From: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/36198?t=8&akid=5601%2E878179%2EsmdFs_) Dear January 6th Committee,

**Thank you** for exposing Donald Trump’s involvement in the January 6th attempted insurrection.

**Thank you** for doing what's right and voting unanimously to subpoena Donald Trump.

**Thank you** for spending countless hours combing over evidence to find the truth out that horrific day.

_**You make me proud to be an American.**_

I’m so proud that we have leaders like YOU who are working to give the American people the truth about the attack on our Democracy.

**The bravery you’ve shown in standing up for what’s right will go down in history.**

Despite the attacks you’ve endured and the censorship you’ve received, you’ve never wavered.

**So thank you. Our country is better because of your leadership.** [**Today, I’m signing this letter and making a donation to VPP to keep electing leaders like you all.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/36198?t=9&akid=5601%2E878179%2EsmdFs_) | [DONATE $5 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/36198?t=10&akid=5601%2E878179%2EsmdFs_)

Sincerely,

A Proud Democrat
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Banned from his own daughter’s graduation
body:
Radical leftist teachers and school districts have gone too far. First, they tried shoving Critical Race Theory and transgen
| | | Fellow American,
Radical leftist teachers and school districts have gone too far. First, they tried shoving Critical Race Theory and transgender propaganda down our throats. Then, they began holding secret “equality clubs” and convinced children that they might be bisexual or transgender without telling their parents. Now, they’re doing everything in their power to completely silence and censor anyone who fights back. **In fact, they’re even BANNING parents from attending their own children’s graduation ceremonies if they disagree with the woke curriculum being taught.** I’m happy to announce that we’re taking legal action to fight back, but we need your help urgently. **[Which is why I’m asking for an emergency donation of $35 or more today to help the Center for American Liberty protect free speech and fight back against the venomous cancel culture that has infiltrated our schools.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi5t69r6rqk4pvmurqj4ibgp4v59v7a87nhmlua0_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhm8oj0cdh2bs)** Shawn McBreairty is the father of a high school senior in Bangor, Maine who was told that he was not allowed to attend his daughter’s graduation ceremony. Why? Because Shawn had the audacity to question the public school’s curriculum and speak out against radical school board members. You see, Shawn filed a series of public record requests (FOAA) and complaints about the conduct of school personnel.** ****However, instead of investigating the issues that Shawn was pointing out, the school district filed a lawsuit against Shawn, seeking to silence him and prevent him from ever filing FOAA requests ever again.** And on top of that, the school district informed him that he was not allowed to attend any of his daughter’s graduation events. But Shawn hasn’t given up – in fact, he’s now working with my team to take the fight to the next level. We’ve filed an Anti-SLAPP motion to dismiss the ridiculous lawsuit against Shawn—because Shawn’s speech is CLEARLY protected by the First Amendment. We’re fighting hard, but we can’t do it without you. **[Will you join the fight for to protect the rights of parents like Shawn today with a gift of $35 or more?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z06atpu1u17sbir2lloe7flu6fql4bt0c62la390_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhm8oj0cdh2bs)** Let me take a moment to introduce myself. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm the Founder of the Center for American Liberty and I've dedicated my career to preserving Constitutional liberties like the freedom of speech which are constantly under attack by the radical left. The Constitution clearly protects your ability to criticize public officials and government employees. It doesn’t matter if it’s the President of the United States or a school board member in your community – no one is above criticism. You and I cannot allow school districts like the Herman School Department in Bangor, Maine, to get away with censoring parents. **Enough is enough.** It’s time for all of us to stand with parents like Shawn and let these radical schools know that they will no longer be allowed to silence us or corrupt our kids. There’s no time to waste. [**So please, send your urgent gift of $35 or more today and help us defeat this ridiculous lawsuit with our Anti-SLAPP motion today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z972e3ecp42cda64evpsdm8c7a90fekgegi8fv68_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhm8oj0cdh2bs) Thank you in advance for your support. Onward to victory,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
|
---
| | P.S. One of the FOAA requests that Shawn filed asked specifically about controversial training that a teacher provided to various schools in the area – that request was denied. We can’t allow schools to hide their activities from parents! **[Join the fight with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or more right now!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2u6n1gl5um8794le9vkg78vrraaan9pbhgaineg_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhm8oj0cdh2bs) **
---
[**DONATE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg6lbr7omktqflsdoq2j5cd65h9uhjonpv00meq8_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhm8oj0cdh2bs)
---

It’s time for all of us to stand with parents like Shawn and let these radical schools know that they will no longer be allowed to silence us or corrupt our kids. There’s no time to waste. Thank you in advance for your support. Onward to victory, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon | | | P.S. One of the FOAA requests that Shawn filed asked specifically about controversial training that a teacher provided to various schools in the area – that request was denied. We can’t allow schools to hide their activities from parents! | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: Peter, this is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Peter, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970427:6klIlbGN1:m:1:3331703221:B34C3D574220BE6CB955385733A27B20:r) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in - by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970427:6klIlbGN1:m:1:3331703221:B34C3D574220BE6CB955385733A27B20:r) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970427:6klIlbGN1:m:1:3331703221:B34C3D574220BE6CB955385733A27B20:r) ** I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970427:6klIlbGN1:m:1:3331703221:B34C3D574220BE6CB955385733A27B20:r)
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970427:6klIlbGN1:m:1:3331703221:B34C3D574220BE6CB955385733A27B20:r)
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970427:6klIlbGN1:m:1:3331703221:B34C3D574220BE6CB955385733A27B20:r)
---
[** DONATE
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970427:6klIlbGN1:m:1:3331703221:B34C3D574220BE6CB955385733A27B20:r)
---
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970427:6klIlbGN1:m:1:3331703221:B34C3D574220BE6CB955385733A27B20:r)
---
[Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970427:6klIlbGN1:m:1:3331703221:B34C3D574220BE6CB955385733A27B20:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970428:6klIlbGN1:m:1:3331703221:B34C3D574220BE6CB955385733A27B20:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606

There are just 9 days left before the runoff election on Tuesday, December 6th, so we don't have a single hour to spare. name: American Update
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0181%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=f5ABx9MFwh%2fELMDFsqG3PQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41997%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M8od4V8tMYOWmAydB%2frgSA&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41998%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hwt04p1CWcB5zYbkx%2fgWmQ&sysid=1)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41998%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hwt04p1CWcB5zYbkx%2fgWmQ&sysid=1)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0181%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=f5ABx9MFwh%2fELMDFsqG3PQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0181%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=f5ABx9MFwh%2fELMDFsqG3PQ&sysid=1)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Banned from his own daughter’s graduation
body:
| | | Fellow American,
Radical leftist teachers and school districts have gone too far.
First, they tried shoving Critical Race Theory and transgender propaganda down our throats. Then, they began holding secret “equality clubs” and convinced children that they might be bisexual or transgender without telling their parents.
Now, they’re doing everything in their power to completely silence and censor anyone who fights back.
**In fact, they’re even BANNING parents from attending their own children’s graduation ceremonies if they disagree with the woke curriculum being taught.** I’m happy to announce that we’re taking legal action to fight back, but we need your help urgently.
**[Which is why I’m asking for an emergency donation of $35 or more today to help the Center for American Liberty protect free speech and fight back against the venomous cancel culture that has infiltrated our schools.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3626fd57753a4c15b1a052568429accf&_e=I_cNEfMluFrNO7lHAKI5sGGBkHPSukxPGjy5sAcFPqBv2_6Vp1afdzh7vT_z9yy74eXDkw7PY34zklb6R8lj_70cMtYy0TLVb3mrwaO0ePgAn0nqOjBduocCpAVlhs7U-cW52Vvq15TdVjQj3HLEU7gV1QdbOG6eexI3L3KNf66ZKZd3VFYzhG107qU2DHqMenf6DMB7M3fECdZ90aTS-oGRlD1DJ2SOhDRxzmIX0CwRfyC43TkikkBu4fQ_BPAC284LbsbUUn1Mg1XqY1-sGFREFV4vJEDMPQ1EomDPtRzpVyI_YAWReSuMWShxaiBX4ZxXgVicya6OJGDJUZ445IqrC7BTPAwyPppGbFETehrVOw4beUbf5I8DRkRTxoLBLIEG_lGhzy9iZyV-YfOv2lPTVTtpRzPOIFw5V2MgEWA%3D)** Shawn McBreairty is the father of a high school senior in Bangor, Maine who was told that he was not allowed to attend his daughter’s graduation ceremony.
Why? Because Shawn had the audacity to question the public school’s curriculum and speak out against radical school board members.
You see, Shawn filed a series of public record requests (FOAA) and complaints about the conduct of school personnel.** ****However, instead of investigating the issues that Shawn was pointing out, the school district filed a lawsuit against Shawn, seeking to silence him and prevent him from ever filing FOAA requests ever again.** And on top of that, the school district informed him that he was not allowed to attend any of his daughter’s graduation events.
But Shawn hasn’t given up – in fact, he’s now working with my team to take the fight to the next level.
We’ve filed an Anti-SLAPP motion to dismiss the ridiculous lawsuit against Shawn—because Shawn’s speech is CLEARLY protected by the First Amendment. We’re fighting hard, but we can’t do it without you.
**[Will you join the fight for to protect the rights of parents like Shawn today with a gift of $35 or more?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3626fd57753a4c15b1a052568429accf&_e=I_cNEfMluFrNO7lHAKI5sGGBkHPSukxPGjy5sAcFPqBv2_6Vp1afdzh7vT_z9yy74eXDkw7PY34zklb6R8lj_70cMtYy0TLVb3mrwaO0ePgAn0nqOjBduocCpAVlhs7U-cW52Vvq15TdVjQj3HLEU7gV1QdbOG6eexI3L3KNf66ZKZd3VFYzhG107qU2DHqMenf6DMB7M3fECdZ90aTS-oGRlD1DJ2SOhDRxzmIX0CwRfyC43TkikkBu4fQ_BPAC284LbsbUUn1Mg1XqY1-sGI-ZIcLIkwD-13CfYJnyO17cJ-Vzp-ykYww3lFq_sAucIgnfwU5MsO9UH46-5wJTk2qGOqgal0aQen3HmmM5vXU8RSItRShGoCmkVYp_3X3n3lxgwZvNHa7SW8y1Jj68jbUr3HoGV40o2V5w7r5cLfI%3D)**
Let me take a moment to introduce myself.
My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm the Founder of the Center for American Liberty and I've dedicated my career to preserving Constitutional liberties like the freedom of speech which are constantly under attack by the radical left. The Constitution clearly protects your ability to criticize public officials and government employees.
It doesn’t matter if it’s the President of the United States or a school board member in your community – no one is above criticism.
You and I cannot allow school districts like the Herman School Department in Bangor, Maine, to get away with censoring parents. **Enough is enough.**
It’s time for all of us to stand with parents like Shawn and let these radical schools know that they will no longer be allowed to silence us or corrupt our kids.
There’s no time to waste.
[**So please, send your urgent gift of $35 or more today and help us defeat this ridiculous lawsuit with our Anti-SLAPP motion today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3626fd57753a4c15b1a052568429accf&_e=I_cNEfMluFrNO7lHAKI5sGGBkHPSukxPGjy5sAcFPqBv2_6Vp1afdzh7vT_z9yy74eXDkw7PY34zklb6R8lj_70cMtYy0TLVb3mrwaO0ePgAn0nqOjBduocCpAVlhs7U-cW52Vvq15TdVjQj3HLEU7gV1QdbOG6eexI3L3KNf66ZKZd3VFYzhG107qU2DHqMenf6DMB7M3fECdZ90aTS-oGRlD1DJ2SOhDRxzmIX0CwRfyC43TkikkBu4fQ_BPAC284LbsbUUn1Mg1XqY1-sGJ6v6VnNNAIybvV5ygioLty6Isxg0hly0XpEZtbaJSCzVNw7kuV07BBBb5xMUgb1z-LK0JcHjPmZfnixP4dvcuKx948mdwxYHuLfmd_X7mYI8DslAQvALwPU77GjICJvLS9imAmR5252CvdzdqJLLv0%3D)
Thank you in advance for your support.
Onward to victory,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: His life and future are in your hands
body:
I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Fellow American, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5eqn8kb67ikpkub2tm5u4eeipm5tbjlgmvg0hr0_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhm2o74cjh2bs) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in – by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcev85s9ua2nm6o0srd26t5q682vnsu8g2ple600_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhm2o74cjh2bs) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9kbsq4sre77i0smov8b648hqmpgjl1mv0rbued8_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhm2o74cjh2bs) ** I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z13vpnqt6hnbao1al7j2vttjlcbic4al88mg9ku0_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhm2o74cjh2bs)
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you,
---

Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, I just want to say thank you.
Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.
We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one. With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.
That's why I'm asking directly: Will you split $25 between me and Serve America right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.
With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking: Will you split $25 or more right now between me and Serve America to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
Thank you for your support.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z08dfua7g6ta0kjmemrrbbooi1p7hj18rgmdq1bg_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhmco34cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp71no6ba8dicj83tjb37mpk4ogrnnib3hsqhgg8_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhmco34cjh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zngeaouq2tjtgr5n6mm4fcbvur5bogvok2ipf3do_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhmco34cjh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

body:
|

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq1n034tf5jubmu61qdkua8bd3k0os8hhtp7ft5g_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhm6or6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcokm1lopv35iohku9kv23oe90hohh9mblgt9h58_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhm6or6clh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhftl27ik3fn6j2i4vdcfev7ct3rfe2ssv21r3to_rp22sh2s8i66or4slhm6or6clh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acbe54de08634dde881c98dffa5fdce7&_e=MvLrzdrJ7KH6_dCnC_G8abpLZZSs_BqbMJnGZX9g0O8WAz4Jrz8gjIT0GLMv_nznZDYPGJW-FmJZbyh_tNv4wBnRziJfba4HU_AljS0KpS57Mbg5wDkKQA1ItmANxugkRh3LrMpOdd-2YZwnF8nnUA9GirTdSVh4QHAP_VetBx-S7kEDeFwnJ_4DJ3AgtFKTI7sl2Wa-h7Qii80yxhgilDrtOxEv3kWsvvil0WYrgX3C7wAQfekm6acWGd_IQq9m1l7U4cRPa1_qGX2izZGD-lOqJYNs9yjSkHoiM1bb0nM0VkUAeY0mJ9ZQESHbYvg1)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acbe54de08634dde881c98dffa5fdce7&_e=MvLrzdrJ7KH6_dCnC_G8abpLZZSs_BqbMJnGZX9g0O8WAz4Jrz8gjIT0GLMv_nznZDYPGJW-FmJZbyh_tNv4wBnRziJfba4HU_AljS0KpS57Mbg5wDkKQA1ItmANxugkRh3LrMpOdd-2YZwnF8nnUA9GirTdSVh4QHAP_VetBx-WkvpZiM_lp1uzNhpYHpaK1AlyIbJtUpbbgep8jnO042p7aTNWwLsosrmIl48y04Aqfbv7khqzqLaWNj-r44ZadnCNSrPPUZ9S_qvhZaehjtsq5ltnGsA1ItCmEvlmFCa-iPMqhxocxfk0vXcRdqi9)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acbe54de08634dde881c98dffa5fdce7&_e=MvLrzdrJ7KH6_dCnC_G8abpLZZSs_BqbMJnGZX9g0O8WAz4Jrz8gjIT0GLMv_nznZDYPGJW-FmJZbyh_tNv4wBnRziJfba4HU_AljS0KpS57Mbg5wDkKQA1ItmANxugkRh3LrMpOdd-2YZwnF8nnUA9GirTdSVh4QHAP_VetBx-sdfXtJWOnatYX1kaxIX1bHezIWxJhLb5mz4n7u7SfUYJMzKDrWEHQehdwQswOHGK2LK73ibMfXPxEmUBAFa4hsHCqDNaPIxDeGadWO6SEHgRu69Ur40veie0kjvSNg2e1pt-3Cn8UOQdepQEzBwZy)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acbe54de08634dde881c98dffa5fdce7&_e=MvLrzdrJ7KH6_dCnC_G8abpLZZSs_BqbMJnGZX9g0O8WAz4Jrz8gjIT0GLMv_nznZDYPGJW-FmJZbyh_tNv4wBnRziJfba4HU_AljS0KpS57Mbg5wDkKQA1ItmANxugkRh3LrMpOdd-2YZwnF8nnUA9GirTdSVh4QHAP_VetBx-Ves0Fld-2TGEpU5cQgTlk2SZVY1AOLNpbC2GEg8qiiakxFbqCYa_q58p86WNuR3YjlJpl6vVRSzFMzjcKD1uyY9Ht6dGXlMgrUPZ599_JP6kmReHky8bX72PyKFOHyEsWOOMPI_aOUZnv0dYjbH1_)

name: Common Sense Florida
subject: How We Save America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Sense For Florida
body:
---
| | | | | |

Peter,
Florida showed up and showed off this year and because of that, we stopped the far-left Democrats' attempt to flip the state Blue and keep a majority in Congress.
**_Why?_ Because most Floridians are sick and tired of the empty promises and lies they've been fed by the Democrat Party for decades, and are eager to just return to common sense principles.**
But now Democrats are rallying top dark money mega donors from across the country and scheming harder than ever before to steal this state in 2024 and begin a total socialist takeover the likes of which we've never seen before, and a return to divisive rhetoric.
Common Sense Florida is leading the fight to expose the Left's lies in the Sunshine State and throughout the country and we're mobilizing a grassroots coalition to stop liberal influence in Florida and keep the state Red for years to come.
**[It will all come down to Florida in 2024. Join my fight to keep this state Red save our country from far-left radicals>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970426:J_g02bGQN:m:1:3331421248:13BD21F838ED16233DC6F3E5EBC45287:r)** | | | | [JOIN THIS FIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970426:J_g02bGQN:m:1:3331421248:13BD21F838ED16233DC6F3E5EBC45287:r)
---
The Left knows my state is the key to keeping the White House in 2024 and that's why I'm fighting so hard in Florida to educate young voters, swing voters, and independents.

**Our country is worth fighting for...** I know that you know that. But now it's time Patriots from all walks of life come together to preserve our freedom and our way of life as we fight against the threat of socialism.

I'll be honest: It won't be easy and it never has, but I'm ready for it and I'd love to have you fighting by my side as we go into the most consequential election cycle of our lifetime.

**[So please, get on the frontlines and join my fight to keep this state Red save our country from far-left radicals>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970426:J_g02bGQN:m:1:3331421248:13BD21F838ED16233DC6F3E5EBC45287:r)**

I look forward to having you with us.

Yours in Liberty,

Fabian Basabe
Chairman, Common Sense Florida

Paid for by Common Sense For Florida

**🚨 BREAKING GA RUNOFF NEWS 🚨**

Peter, I have some disturbing news.

body:
I’ve been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our heart in the game. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6493%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=QjryEQ9zNZp8QxrbYDMXGg&sysid=1)
|

---
Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Fellow American, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Fellow American, to ensure we keep it close.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84837%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DNn0SXpCW4Z%2balk%2fJZvbeQ&sysid=1)**

We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. **[If every person reading this email right now would send in just $7, we'd easily hit our goal.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84839%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yBsPB9q0tgJinTQojVtD2w&sysid=1)**

**[So Fellow American, I'm personally asking you today to chip in $7 or even $34 to my campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so that we win this critical runoff!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84830%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R1ojHBfwJfWrF6Alyx8nfA&sysid=1)**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c5fa0a2472e7494b88fc8e9d38f2eae3&_e=iDXP1RgaQGqDRN5FHgD3NtdMg8fPFVCg2inT0XX4IMWE_CT6r4RqMia4N024GH4fVerTdDuytlCMAPtNE3rCDtdy7hpbAJkhwTLjgkQp4m0nclDQ689qjp7_rJ-Cx1pXhI9ls0XqWbDmKgfkdIcrX2p8hqiPel9Y6r8joM7u0PZdGEgymTdrkI78nrq99Um5elsJsDxAsHsh5mV8yvohmeMJgZnc8SzKxjwSpmuWAoyPld1lOoD7u_mQi7yAFFhArvKUIXCQNuA5ua23YMfokjRD6CSvE_d3BjsuAerWbMdMciBFcyQczfIdJ5xOz0pW2Xvc_BlI04mJHO7oyDt3pcKKdkkd8pWLx3yGEVqMeZhQzlDt2Dd9YcIEpNgfjTK70usJGFKwa7biM_dk5voAJw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c5fa0a2472e7494b88fc8e9d38f2eae3&_e=iDXP1RgaQGqDRN5FHgD3NtdMg8fPFVCg2inT0XX4IMWE_CT6r4RqMia4N024GH4fVerTdDuytlCMAPtNE3rCDtdy7hpbAJkhwTLjgkQp4m0nclDQ689qjp7_rJ-Cx1pXhI9ls0XqWbDmKgfkdIcrX2p8hqiPel9Y6r8joM7u0PZdGEgymTdrkI78nrq99Um5elsJsDxAsHsh5mV8yvohmeMJgZnc8SzKxjwSpmuWAoyPld1lOoD7u_mQi7yAFFhACsiyD9W5vVm3Rw8QcwRga_m-DzktEAgpWlCPMxp_ZW6y8zd4Y1nmbYMynysAoS00BKlTL3x_MVl7eiNMABK1liioigkO_2u6Wb9ykK2iP-XcDtVKA72d1xqWnwM9Gfg9NQWfPuhqnNyqipdH9RWONw%3D%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c5fa0a2472e7494b88fc8e9d38f2eae3&_e=iDXP1RgaQGqDRN5FHgD3NtdMg8fPFVCg2inT0XX4IMWE_CT6r4RqMia4N024GH4fVerTdDuytlCMAPtNE3rCDtdy7hpbAJkhwTLjgkQp4m0nclDQ689qjp7_rJ-Cx1pXhI9ls0XqWbDmKgfkdIcrX2p8hqiPel9Y6r8joM7u0PZdGEgymTdrkI78nrq99Um5elsJsDxAsHsh5mV8yvohmeMJgZnc8SzKxjwSpmuWAoyPld1lOoD7u_mQi7yAFFhAUq-1_HI5D_45V4R5Q_51XDW_u9kCfU5bn13NX52lfvG3pTOOa40pQkLwnktb9eWyTDHZJSuJqfEy78acDmz0P_qAJnbXtHq4KN9kLhxU_NtVxhQd7E057K8vUu69NxIvyQfzE2-TfZgSouMRH5kLag%3D%3D) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Peter._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win in 9 days, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970411:JVKwEbGNW:m:1:3317145305:A83D129DCFBE90CEA2565EA742C9E465:r)
**[We need EVERYONE reading this email right now to contribute $25, $30, or $50.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970411:JVKwEbGNW:m:1:3317145305:A83D129DCFBE90CEA2565EA742C9E465:r)** Herschel was outraised 3 to 1 in the general election, and there is every reason to believe that it could happen again if we don't rally behind Herschel immediately.

The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY.

The stakes are enormous. Herschel will help stop the woke insanity, inflation, crime, and open borders. Raphael Warnock will only be a rubber stamp for the Biden-Schumer agenda.

**[Every one of us must step up before it's too late, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970411:JVKwEbGNW:m:1:3317145305:A83D129DCFBE90CEA2565EA742C9E465:r)**

**[Will you join me in standing with Herschel Walker?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970411:JVKwEbGNW:m:1:3317145305:A83D129DCFBE90CEA2565EA742C9E465:r)**

For Freedom,

Ted Cruz

So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. | | | (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I am running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I need to know I have your support | Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970288:6uxUEbGsN:m:1:3253819041:99D6C1B977E4F8B1D1B57A7EA914AFC1:r)

**[BREAKING NEWS FROM MAR-A-LAGO: DONALD J. TRUMP ANNOUNCES 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RUN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970288:6uxUEbGsN:m:1:3253819041:99D6C1B977E4F8B1D1B57A7EA914AFC1:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970288:6uxUEbGsN:m:1:3253819041:99D6C1B977E4F8B1D1B57A7EA914AFC1:r)

Peter,

Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true: **I am OFFICIALLY running to be the next President of the United States, and together we are going to make our Country great again!**

When I was your President, we put America First and accomplished more than any other president, and under circumstances that no president had to deal with before. No matter what the Left-wing media and their friends, _the Democrats,_ threw at us, we NEVER stopped working to **Make America Great Again.**

And, Peter, we did Make America Great Again. Then Joe Biden ruined our country faster than anyone could ever imagine. _That's why I'm running AGAIN, we need to save our Country._

Democrats have all but destroyed everything we accomplished under my administration because they want to take away your dignity and your destiny.

I will NEVER let them do that, which is why _I am proud to announce that I AM RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT IN 2024._ I'm calling on my most fierce and loyal supporters, like YOU, to cement your name in history as one of the FIRST _**Official 2024 Presidential Founders.**_

_Your generous contributions in the past have been a MAJOR reason we've been able to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left, and I'm counting on you to step up again at this critical time. We need to have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message._

**[Please contribute $20.24 IMMEDIATELY to become an Official 2024 Presidential Founder and go down in history with me.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970288:6uxUEbGsN:m:1:3253819041:99D6C1B977E4F8B1D1B57A7EA914AFC1:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970288:6uxUEbGsN:m:1:3253819041:99D6C1B977E4F8B1D1B57A7EA914AFC1:r)

I need your support now more than ever, Peter. _The Democrats hate me more now than they did in 2020,_ and I need all hands on deck if we're going to defeat them.

We need to prioritize **PROTECTING** the integrity of our Elections, **SECURING** our Southern Border, **RESTORING** our once-great economy, and **STANDING UP** to our enemies, domestic and abroad. All these things will be of the utmost importance, but I can only accomplish them with YOUR help.

My team is going to send me a list with the names of every Patriot who contributes to become an **Official 2024 Presidential Founder.** Will I see your name on the list?

**[Please donate RIGHT NOW to stand with me and get your name on the FIRST Official 2024 Presidential Founder roster I review.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970288:6uxUEbGsN:m:1:3253819041:99D6C1B977E4F8B1D1B57A7EA914AFC1:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970288:6uxUEbGsN:m:1:3253819041:99D6C1B977E4F8B1D1B57A7EA914AFC1:r)
Donald J. Trump

**[DONATE HERE>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970288:6uxUEbGsN:m:1:3253819041:99D6C1B977E4F8B1D1B57A7EA914AFC1:r)**

Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. [donaldjtrump.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970289:6uxUEbGsN:m:1:3253819041:99D6C1B977E4F8B1D1B57A7EA914AFC1:r)
Trump Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219

I’m looking forward to getting to Congress to work on the issues impacting New Mexicans, like creating more good-paying jobs and lowering costs, expanding access to affordable healthcare, defending reproductive choice, and protecting our public lands. But Republicans narrowly took back the House, which means it’s going to be an uphill battle to pass legislation to address these key issues and make progress. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=252d73bad3ac4495a21403782b8686d7&_e=9M9fHJznhL1Vf-N9c8TW9EevNcUdJD-l9ip_dfamY4QWHBkqrwD7KIuCT4FXKnVaIjHA4B_PY2Qxg5PEQL8M1XWhsc9Pj10OxUC9-kQympHK1BkjwERK4gE0DxPqIBhwl_ayV3ebU9HwfcBu7LSAfnx0focSLyjoMjVBeIklVq0vHVApkqLWgHnDQ2o-t2fVAf4HDB0PTfCazEF3kd6MhMvZ1KBoOlmgk1EIPSdvAmvJgcmWyPeXjEnsdWIji4O0pROef7hY8SG0sx_vG3ycErhvOQf879VAJrr4yoKFYXk-Dc1yj2kJ-iPyps-BdBc7xiQmO8P2LJ8RzY0NXLWZBE-RXIInd6lPwTTMA0mhUeYuJ098118SomJ1ZTO1RnyptSHkW8Gazdl2_5rQ-fwEFA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=252d73bad3ac4495a21403782b8686d7&_e=9M9fHJznhL1Vf-N9c8TW9EevNcUdJD-l9ip_dfamY4QWHBkqrwD7KIuCT4FXKnVaIjHA4B_PY2Qxg5PEQL8M1XWhsc9Pj10OxUC9-kQympHK1BkjwERK4gE0DxPqIBhwl_ayV3ebU9HwfcBu7LSAfnx0focSLyjoMjVBeIklVq0vHVApkqLWgHnDQ2o-t2fVAf4HDB0PTfCazEF3kd6MhMvZ1KBoOlmgk1EIPSdvAmvJgcmWyPeXjEnsdWIji4O01AUwFKNlPuKfgGFK4hKnkD3EIomZwiUl0LOAMTAIfXxtZp9tUJUlhUQveMkD8ddEFYgtdMOcXgZ1f9katuYRLD8v5RAcFXsQAajCxJz9SF4QYwcCLgjU7iiTr5RR9UCb39EzUFcjH9Vmb4BKjmBr7A%3D%3D) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=252d73bad3ac4495a21403782b8686d7&_e=9M9fHJznhL1Vf-N9c8TW9EevNcUdJD-l9ip_dfamY4QWHBkqrwD7KIuCT4FXKnVaIjHA4B_PY2Qxg5PEQL8M1XWhsc9Pj10OxUC9-kQympHK1BkjwERK4gE0DxPqIBhwl_ayV3ebU9HwfcBu7LSAfnx0focSLyjoMjVBeIklVq0vHVApkqLWgHnDQ2o-t2fVAf4HDB0PTfCazEF3kd6MhMvZ1KBoOlmgk1EIPSdvAmvJgcmWyPeXjEnsdWIji4O0y0LZmcvXaovitSE-hscd9QJSHCptCcnm0nfzg91ZzIJodLH0nHv2dpsPoae6GFbkPnM10myK2VBEWNY1daL72aKx5G8O3-0S8Y42GXHti2hPt8TVayqNuUleKxwlpAnH-xSjqt0V0CTI-PSTWFyozA%3D%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
