Friend,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxlkc2umzAQhZ8GdkbYxpAsWKQXSPqTRKJN2q4QssdgXWOQgV4lT19DaVW1kmXJ35w5M56BFMfxnrEYJ4kv0ojUWHJfpSQkBGOSYEoxZoGQEQkjypiQjDOovSiErlY6kBZgapV5BSvc-xHwvvPbVOwpELajeBdFLIwgwq4AhHIHmEsJO1-n7TQNo0cPHincGYHPFoI3ZSyIxcSxCeoOtWBH3oJGynDH7Gx6KVFj-9kI1NQdoF4_ukFxZD1azFNXjf1sOXg0s_DDI_GCeN0NtWrMAleDX_lL-qZYtDTbrBzrQKi5c2j9pgMjd4_fU6lOefn55ZR_qvK8Kso8_3J6f_mYl1V5u1yLAh3L6-2SoePhnFdlfv9bstX7z39tszcTmMlRwzU6JeWT7Itv5d2FK6OVcIF_YKuEm2H2PD_bw_XDd9-mYnhTWqsxTtyOmnVHy0rcALSSj9RL3nmErGmErNMn80Tv9e12tg-kX7-iI7uTZgmSF3dPjwH-KDeTYOuZeEn2E_dDthk)**

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxlkcGOmzAQhp8GbkbYxpA9cMgGSNptEoluUvWEvGYAd42hBhpln34NpdWqlSxL883M7_E_EOMwfGAsxFHklnFAOK6EK2PiE4IxiTClGDOvrALiB5SxsmKCAXcCH1oulVcZgLGR-hVMaeO7J7rWbWIGLyH2N5tNGNAHEgTBy4Zin4TMx8B9HroqbsaxHxy6dUhmzwBiMuDdpDZQziKWjcBb1IAZRAMKSS0sM5PuqgrVppt0iWreAurUve2lQMah2TS2xdBNRoBDEwO_HBLOSPC257LWM1wEfvfP7WvFXEuTVcqyFko5tRYt37RgEDb440pxSPOvu0P6pUjTIsvT9Pnw6fSU5kV-OZ2zDO3z8-WUoP32mBZ5ev1Ysr73n_4yZqdH0KOlWij0nN92P68_-BO36UIrWdrEP7CRpfUweTu-Ndvz5--uicv-JpWSQxjZHdXLjuaVWAOUrO6xEz06hCxthCzuk2mkV365HM0dqddvaM-upJ6TZGfv8d7D38pVxFtnJk6UvAMxabaH)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $5 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.

clean_body: I have an update on our ground game in this critical Georgia Senate race. WATCH NOW. | Friend, Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th. Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible. Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on. Today's Goal: Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $5 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters. How we win: By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th. We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want. I sincerely hope you'll answer the call. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join the fight to protect the unborn
body:
I’m writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn. And today I need your help. |
---
| | Hi Friend,

This is Dr. Ben Carson--I'm writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn.** And today I need your help.**

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice democrats and major media outlets to codify on-demand abortion at taxpayers' expense.

**We cannot allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that abortion should be unrestricted.**

Today I'd like to ask you to join thousands of others who believe the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to the pledge I have linked below:

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/sign-pro-life-statement/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e893be182284631a9ff0b4c0a174882&_e=ka81Eu-2xrvexm7pGWVtFXPLriwiB8osriYDqPvn_hSNPzNsGo5JSe2d6qrEQ3DKQd8Tg7oQyLFWOnXWtD4S6jS_o2MGLSeSSG1P-FyZXqOPg-vniJxNpbYuT9okvFZIE7VkIe-MOGMaMRC5UZy7hXslS3b87oD0BIhFbEtz85wEhSGxWleRAFrt8PR83A2tir5VCEfOn20VhruVEZ_PPBQeiIJRRl7cwSaXmfGlz0Xp7OyQRbSCHHFG7SQHb5-PYYtgo3TkFC7fvKlvD6qhWRl3EGBMVmc4DinEhieGyp0u-VrHy5bDVOzAX-HpLGZ5UBJCSnyMdoHKkClWFWV6rVKkYBdv1YGwpTbZWkD_VFG_kEt16QkjWQ9ZQZN9g9_7)**

I will do everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the spread of the Left's anti-life ideology. [**Will you take one minute to stand with me by signing this pledge now?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e893be182284631a9ff0b4c0a174882&_e=ka81Eu-2xrvexm7pGWVtFXPLriwiB8osriYDqPvn_hSNPzNsGo5JSe2d6qrEQ3DKQd8Tg7oQyLFWOnXWtD4S6jS_o2MGLSeSSG1P-FyZXqOPg-vniJxNpbYuT9okvFZIE7VkIe-MOGMaMRC5UZy7hXslS3b87oD0BIhFbEtz85wEhSGxWleRAFrt8PR83A2tir5VCEfOn20VhruVEZ_PPBQeiIJRRl7cwSaXmfGlz0UZd0bV_7i3Fj0Fv09_mPcTnyPiIefpVPL3Gnn9fk3dsKDK1NokpyCcski1Aw4scE87go3PLHz_lQOX-iKkocFshOMgxybGiDLZC33uiZsNUpZaehmu0dK6TdFW8xCD43ls1FwaXJxLd03SVWP8NS_E)

I'd like to thank you for joining this critical effort. Together, we can save thousands of lives from abortion over the next year. Gratefully,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---

---

subject: Do you approve of Donald Trump?

body:
| | |
---
**Breaking via FiveThirtyEight: "Trump Is Favored To Win The 2024 Republican Presidential Primary"**
_Donald Trump’s four years in office were DISASTROUS for our country. Now he's running for president AGAIN, and we need to hear from TOP Democrats like you:_
**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11065?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221127-TrumpAlert-TrumpFavored1QS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221127-TrumpAlert-TrumpFavored1QS-Pros-sl1&akid=8905%2E9716520%2EcBKAnu)
Team, just **_days_** after Donald Trump announced he's running again in 2024, **the experts at Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight have declared him the FAVORITE to win the Republican nomination!**

Our country can’t afford another four years of Trump’s corruption, bigotry, and cruelty. We MUST do everything we can to STOP his momentum before it takes off!

We've launched an URGENT Live Poll to show that Democrats will NOT stand by as Trump tears our country apart. But the poll closes at midnight, and **we still need 34 more responses from Pennsylvania! Please, tell us right now:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11065?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221127-TrumpAlert-TrumpFavored1QS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221127-TrumpAlert-TrumpFavored1QS-Pros-sl1&akid=8905%2E9716520%2EcBKAnu)

Thanks,

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: He deserved a Pulitzer, instead he was arrested
body:
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he 's been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I'm asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88df07af18264fdba1ed32c49ed944ac&_e=Ppik6mytAOzXguQFk3FKCq4LAF3WCEDsjTlZQfLrU_80R7Hz6CysIzQcIHCJeG48Bo8DppBWXddv333pvLPLKr-gGavE41TEgIkOHyXvxTD0xeL3Js3NUwfx5V9uD35mP49xGhzfVPzxxXqLm1UH7rrivLlhkhYbNrBMKOqzgzBPETregw10544uHjS3RYkuY6fjOgIar4Fxeqvv9y4Jx_Z10hC6mxe_RwuzDmvdLP3PRTaoGgUPE6L8NuQNo6X4U87gQZC3Rw4PWBEyPqhKIVvS4wURwBN5WW37szIXwck4vmv-uJFw2CYo2sVxkokWU5ag-T7Wtb6CCQKgPBHK55FuaRjQHNDzvaPbLwL0uDLa_ayrFqKTzck1uGo_BgPHyNmtgsoIIAr_Y-WvAqPwAg%3D%3D)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88df07af18264fdba1ed32c49ed944ac&_e=Ppik6mytAOzXguQFk3FKCq4LAF3WCEDsjTlZQfLrU_80R7Hz6CysIzQcIHCJeG48Bo8DppBWXddv333pvLPLKr-gGavE41TEgIkOHyXvxTD0xeL3Js3NUwfx5V9uD35mP49xGhzfVPzxxXqLm1UH7rrivLlhkhYbNrBMKOqzgzBPETregw10544uHjS3RYkuY6fjOgIar4Fxeqvv9y4Jx_Z10hC6mxe_RwuzDmvdLP3PRTaoGgUPE6L8NuQNo6X4-4hwep_V-op2muOaj8Kylolk0aX39LwgMdBsCNaLtm8lWIicRvyx_l1WLh11jok6sbolhSh5rJAPwgaktDi519Mqty8rQh2Ye1zMPHxjV-fKDwE710IeY6HMQzyMu46Z1RVMW3BHDp-e3AsEEybk7Q%3D%3D)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88df07af18264fdba1ed32c49ed944ac&_e=Ppik6mytAOzXguQFk3FKCq4LAF3WCEDsjTlZQfLrU_80R7Hz6CysIzQcIHCJeG48Bo8DppBWXddv333pvLPLKr-gGavE41TEgIkOHyXvxTD0xeL3Js3NUwfx5V9uD35mP49xGhzfVPzxxXqLm1UH7rrivLlhkhYbNrBMKOqzgzBPETregw10544uHjS3RYkuY6fjOgIar4Fxeqvv9y4Jx_Z10hC6mxe_RwuzDmvdLP3PRTaoGgUPE6L8NuQNo6X4sx9auH7EynHufsLobOX70fXvDEr4XliN28XiIZVe7HUJsAYUXYCCasXV82H8vGyI5p9mEuNtr9EkDTMCSjV8_mTxNl4lWJkt1A7cy1uGlGuA0g-WXVbTHNNMWdTfqlq5e9ExvBIoDrIYiFbo2nc8UQ%3D%3D)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood's nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We're fighting back, but we'll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment - they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88df07af18264fdba1ed32c49ed944ac&_e=Ppik6mytAOzXguQFk3FKCq4LAF3WCEDsjTlZQfLrU_80R7Hz6CysIzQcIHCJeG48Bo8DppBWXddv333pvLPLKr-gGavE41TEgIkOHyXvxTD0xeL3Js3NUwfx5V9uD35mP49xGhzfVPzxxXqLm1UH7rrivLlhkhYbNrBMKOqzgzBPETregw10544uHjS3RYkuY6fjOgIar4Fxeqvv9y4Jx_Z10hC6mxe_RwuzDmvdLP3PRTaoGgUPE6L8NuQNo6X4J8QgRk86QiZikM6WZpRRaqXneZiqUUo-MqDFilps_iGaImsfWQf0UXKjGLIeA9tBAt-SWMhcsH6nGwFRL36c_we3U0JNHXoa_-507S5AlP0iJnj2My5StUdFkTeBHHy6205EjVrp3Fl2Dr_XxboRdg%3D%3D)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88df07af18264fdba1ed32c49ed944ac&_e=Ppik6mytAOzXguQFk3FKCq4LAF3WCEDsjTlZQfLrU_80R7Hz6CysIzQcIHCJeG48Bo8DppBWXddv333pvLPLKr-gGavE41TEgIkOHyXvxTD0xeL3Js3NUwfx5V9uD35mP49xGhzfVPzxxXqLm1UH7rrivLlhkhYbNrBMKOqzgzBPETregw10544uHjS3RYkuY6fjOgIar4Fxeqvv9y4Jx_Z10hC6mxe_RwuzDmvdLP3PRTaoGgUPE6L8NuQNo6X4TpszQGLvUtJKXBs5_8WWm00e2BR3BkVhd6MHgxtTEKOc1Vz2TqAL3dsof3IIJPT2oSEUd1AXMhfnUGi-IotXwRmleHCs-bFzuuy2I-nG0Co6xPDjQyCXQ3rPlbsVhPu6OMWd6xBjU8FVOCbLzP8Ocg%3D%3D)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. clean_body: Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts. And now, he 's been charged with nine bogus felonies. You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... ... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos. I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back. I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS. In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases. The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood's nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We're fighting back, but we'll need your help. The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment - they want a ruling against David without a trial at all! And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends. That's why David needs your financial support today. I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? ** The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Mark Houck
subject: My life and my future are in your hands, Peter
body:
| | | Dear Peter, I am writing to you to encourage your support of the Thomas More Society defense efforts for me and my family. Since my arrest on September 23rd, and even prior to that, the Thomas More Society team has been such a gift to us. From Matt Heffron, who handled my grand jury investigation, to Peter Breen, Thomas More Society attorneys have been a pure blessing in this legal battle. What confidence it brings to me and my wife, knowing that my life and future lie in the hands of these talented and capable God-fearing men. Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election. Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue. But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight. The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this. name: John Legend
subject: Hi, friend – it’s John Legend. Today, I’m personally asking you to join me in helping Rev. Raphael Warnock win his neck and neck Senate race in Georgia.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55153972/380812687/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5088-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzA3ZDgzOC02NDZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6T3AqXyKFmKm7AP_wE9m2O_9oHO9vufjBhf8tAm_WQY=) Hi, friend – it’s John Legend. Today, I’m personally asking you to join me in helping Rev. Raphael Warnock win his neck and neck Senate race in Georgia.
You might not know this, but Rev. Warnock and I actually share a lot in common. We both grew up in working-class families and got our starts in church. For Rev. Warnock, it meant preaching from Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s pulpit. And for me, it meant leading my own church choir.
There’s one more thing that we have in common, and it’s the reason I’m reaching out today: **We both know that Democrats must expand the Senate majority this November to make real progress for the American people – and that means keeping Georgia blue.**
**[Please, will you chip in $5 or more now to help Rev. Warnock win in Georgia and expand the Senate majority for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55153973/380812693/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5088-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzA3ZDgzOC02NDZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6T3AqXyKFmKm7AP_wE9m2O_9oHO9vufjBhf8tAm_WQY=)**
Experts are saying that Rev. Warnock’s race in Georgia will come down to resources. And that’s exactly why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment are coming after him with everything they’ve got.
**In fact, GOP donors have spent over $37 million to turn Georgia red. Now, Rev. Warnock is neck and neck with his opponent, Herschel Walker.**
That’s why Rev. Warnock needs your support so urgently. **[The future of our democracy is at stake in this race, so I’m personally asking, friend: Will you make a donation to Rev. Warnock’s campaign today to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55153974/380812694/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5088-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzA3ZDgzOC02NDZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6T3AqXyKFmKm7AP_wE9m2O_9oHO9vufjBhf8tAm_WQY=)**
Our country needs Rev. Warnock in the Senate, and together, I know we can make sure he can continue the critical fights ahead.

– John Legend
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55153975/380812697/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5088-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzA3ZDgzOC02NDZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6T3AqXyKFmKm7AP_wE9m2O_9oHO9vufjBhf8tAm_WQY=)

clean_body: | | | = Hi, friend – it’s John Legend. Today, I’m personally asking you to join me in helping Rev. Raphael Warnock win his neck and neck Senate race in Georgia. You might not know this, but Rev. Warnock and I actually share a lot in common. We both grew up in working-class families and got our starts in church. For Rev. Warnock, it meant preaching from Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s pulpit. And for me, it meant leading my own church choir. There’s one more thing that we have in common, and it’s the reason I’m reaching out today: We both know that Democrats must expand the Senate majority this November to make real progress for the American people – and that means keeping Georgia blue. = Experts are saying that Rev. Warnock’s race in Georgia will come down to resources. And that’s exactly why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment are coming after him with everything they’ve got. In fact, GOP donors have spent over $37 million to turn Georgia red. Now, Rev. Warnock is neck and neck with his opponent, Herschel Walker. That’s why Rev. Warnock needs your support so urgently. = Our country needs Rev. Warnock in the Senate, and together, I know we can make sure he can continue the critical fights ahead. – John Legend = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. name: The Giffords Team
subject: A look back at 2022... and where we’re headed next
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s been a busy year for us here at Giffords. Here’s a look back at what we accomplished.
#

Friends -
It’s been an eventful year for us here at Giffords PAC in the ongoing fight to end gun violence.
Gun safety was a winning issue in this year’s midterm elections—we endorsed 288 candidates in races across the country and we saw an 84% win rate. Congress also passed the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, the most significant gun safety legislation to become law in nearly 30 years.
We’d like to take a moment to share some of the most notable moments from our work over the past year—none of which would have been possible without supporters like you.
**Giffords Florida**
This year, we had the historic launch of our Giffords Florida program. To coincide with the launch of this initiative, we conducted a bus tour with multiple stops across the state.
During our 21 events, we hosted meet and greets and press conferences across the state with activists, survivors, and elected officials to discuss the importance of commonsense gun safety legislation, such as universal background checks.
We also authored a report about the disproportionate impact that gun violence has on Hispanic and Latino communities, both in Florida and across our country.
Although election outcomes may not have been as we hoped in Florida, there is no doubt that many Floridians want to elect leaders with the courage to act. We look forward to continuing our outreach in Florida in the future.
**Investments in Pennsylvania and Colorado**
This year, we invested $5 million in ads for the Pennsylvania and Colorado Senate races. We’re proud to have been a part of the effort to elect John Fetterman in Pennsylvania and to re-elect Senator Michael Bennet in Colorado. Both candidates were running against opponents who have pledged their allegiances to the gun lobby.
**Virtual and In-Person Events**
This year, Giffords held 67 events—both virtually and in-person across the country. Gabby and the team traveled to Washington, Massachusetts, Georgia, North Carolina, New Mexico, and Wisconsin to rally for candidates committed to gun safety.
**Oregon Ballot Initiative 114**
Gun safety was on the ballot in Oregon this year with Ballot Initiative 114—one of the most comprehensive gun safety legislation packages ever passed at the state level.
We’re proud to have invested six figures into helping pass this legislation. It will require permits issued by local law enforcement to purchase firearms, will enforce more comprehensive background checks to apply for a permit, and will prohibit the possession and usage of magazines containing more than ten rounds of ammunition.
We’re grateful to have you on our team. The 2022 election cycle is over, but the fight to end gun violence is not. As we prepare for our new Congress to be sworn in next year, we must keep up our work to hold our elected officials accountable to keeping our communities safe.
[**So please, make a contribution of $3 or any amount you can afford today to fuel our work at Giffords PAC in the year to come.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov22.2v05GQ&refcode=em221127-1-15&t=1&akid=2787%2E3935704%2E3fdCXw)
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov22.2v05GQ&refcode=em221127-1-15&t=2&akid=2787%2E3935704%2E3fdCXw)**
Thank you for your continued support of Giffords and our mission to end gun violence.
\- The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2787%2E3935704%2E3fdCXw) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
| | | Friend, this year **we defied the pundits, the naysayers, and history itself by keeping the Senate blue** — but there is one more election left to win in 2022.

The Georgia Senate seat held by my friend Raphael Warnock is still up for grabs — and this one race could make _all the difference._

[**So, can you join me in the fight to expand our majority for years to come by rushing $5 to the DSCC right now? With the runoff just 9 days away, now’s the time for us to come together >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221127-VicePresidentKamalaHarris-SignedGARunoff-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221127-VicePresidentKamalaHarris-SignedGARunoff-Pros-sl1&akid=8946%2E9716520%2Eya62Dk)

**I’m ready to make history by winning this runoff and expanding our majority, and I know this grassroots team is too. So I'm asking you directly:**

Fellow American,

**I'll be blunt: when I look at Georgia, I am worried.**

I'm worried because Raphael Warnock is on the verge of getting re-elected if we don't have Herschel Walker's back on December 6.

**We cannot afford to let the Left win another seat in the U.S. Senate.**

Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time. From crippling inflationary policies to woke ideology in the classroom and inept foreign policy abroad, their plan is taking us down the wrong path.

If we don't turn things around soon, the United States of America will no longer be the Shining City on a Hill.

We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. If we all wait for somebody else to step up, Herschel will lose due to a lack of resources - _plain and simple._

clean_body: There is no substitute for victory – help Herschel Walker WIN. | Fellow American, I'll be blunt: when I look at Georgia, I am worried. I'm worried because Raphael Warnock is on the verge of getting re-elected if we don't have Herschel Walker's back on December 6. We cannot afford to let the Left win another seat in the U.S. Senate. Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time. From crippling inflationary policies to woke ideology in the classroom and inept foreign policy abroad, their plan is taking us down the wrong path. If we don't turn things around soon, the United States of America will no longer be the Shining City on a Hill. We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. If we all wait for somebody else to step up, Herschel will lose due to a lack of resources - plain and simple. If you want to help flip the FINAL Senate race of the year from BLUE to RED, then stop what you're doing and make an immediate contribution RIGHT NOW. 100% of your contribution will go directly to Herschel Walker's Senate campaign to help him WIN on December 6. In times like these, there is no substitute for victory. This is your opportunity to help Herschel be the conservative fighter we need in Washington. Are you with me? We need to send a powerful message to the radical Left, so I want this email to hit Herschel's MASSIVE fundraising goal by midnight. Herschel is counting on you to help him flip the final Senate seat of 2022 and help Republicans hold onto 50 seats in the United States Senate. name: Conservatives Give
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1ebcb02ec44451e88118528c5ed20bd&_e=SF2ipQGLaxZjK7LPYKzVXNkQkP8HoLy_LkWgfzKrQB-BMtvByQhmghTWWHKBPbXbrk8QfUcCvcLo0aZZ1y2l_bujAVDHpfC3hqQoPed0aDym19FCSrhrGA851h-0_xeYvxZY7usm5BWLvlZCLLGZ-Do4YVaBvo3cOclc20Axi7z6Narlfoawn_-a2kHTcMM07YPLYZqDRWlSJhKTw-FK3b0V0Ji4NdZPfCTcYcEIx-O7EWmeDaJSUALzSafVnDCR1oYKWEKfvRgX0C0lW_gzQKXLDrEtHdr-orNEefirWabwtjwcfLdwLAAmSkYRbGLOtb9X6u0z69K4zWHRcfc3_TuFRdFzjYpF0cWK58fIsbwJ0nN7txiHZDQOhw52nVM-DiwqQXAAgXcDzQNBHG3EGw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "_The Federalist Papers_ ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1ebcb02ec44451e88118528c5ed20bd&_e=SF2ipQGLaxZjK7LPYKzVXNkQkP8HoLy_LkWgfzKrQB-BMtvByQhmghTWWHKBPbXbrk8QfUcCvcLo0aZZ1y2l_bujAVDHpfC3hqQoPed0aDym19FCSrhrGA851h-0_xeYvxZY7usm5BWLvlZCLLGZ-Do4YVaBvo3cOclc20Axi7z6Narlfoawn_-a2kHTcMM07YPLYZqDRWlSJhKTw-FK3b0V0Ji4NdZPfCTcYcEIx-O7EWmeDaJSUALzSafVnDCRHk_IDsEGjXz2S52NoujPWaZiCh6xHimF6JLtNNdXdVW1lthB95_4O-QyjUPx365kHyqPSAI-9b8QGECRA9N8vKk1ijlG8PhDihrVNPsZydyOPD1eK0lzySupQMl4OYOMz-kbeOKqsvSpwwCjXNWPdA%3D%3D) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_" The Federalist Papers"_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won't last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1ebcb02ec44451e88118528c5ed20bd&_e=SF2ipQGLaxZjK7LPYKzVXNkQkP8HoLy_LkWgfzKrQB-BMtvByQhmghTWWHKBPbXbrk8QfUcCvcLo0aZZ1y2l_bujAVDHpfC3hqQoPed0aDym19FCSrhrGA851h-0_xeYvxZY7usm5BWLvlZCLLGZ-Do4YVaBvo3cOclc20Axi7z6Narlfoawn_-a2kHTcMM07YPLYZqDRWlSJhKTw-FK3b0V0Ji4NdZPfCTcYcEIx-O7EWmeDaJSUALzSafVnDCRPmmeXKQIdUQOwiLCs312iybjGjnekVa6SJctok5XWjFnIH0d0fxtT47vSFM5tTVJFQ3HVBl49ATx8E_iFrfkGfhQXPlJcvz6auH2LC9lEtzHlhmm9Ltx6PMbaAz7NZxrXD6DSBnJm-3iUZ0ZWLCZ8A%3D%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: There are still House seats to count, and we're in good shape in them, including CA-13, where the count could go for another week. The more we can narrow the margin of the Republican majority, the more chaos for Republicans, and the more leverage Democrats have. Can you support a fair count for this important race?
body:
House election count update
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T564ef88c-cd49-416e-9dec-d2fa70d8997a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | **_UPDATE :_**** ** Republicans currently have 220 House seats--giving them a narrow majority--yet, there are a couple seats left, and we're in good shape in them. _In CA-13, the news is really good news. While Adam Gray's currently trailing by less than 600 votes with 4% left to count, The Washington Post election model says that when all votes are counted they expect Gray to win! So let's make doubly sure Gray has the resources to COUNT EVERY VOTE AND WIN THIS RACE!!_ **[To do this, can you give $5, $10, $25 to Adam Gray so he can pay the staffers and lawyers who are the watchdogs in this effort. Let's take this seat and have an even better holiday season!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65c7277e-824b-4570-a545-0f4184ae8f16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_THANK YOU!_**
**_Cliff_** On Fri, Nov 18, 2022 at 9:09 AM Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action <info@mail.blueampaction.com> wrote: Peter, **_At this point: EVERY VOTE COUNTS_** **_218 House votes have been called for Republicans, giving them a one-seat majority in the House of Representatives. But, there are still a half dozen races or so outstanding, and every seat matters. _** **[We need CA-13 and can win it! Let's make sure Adam Gray has the funds necessary for staff& lawyers for what might be a two-week-long count in California. Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Adam Gray!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T83e8721a-50dd-4aa1-9470-76766499e175/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_If Democrats can deny Republicans more than a 1-3 seat majority, it will lead to chaos on the GOP side._One Republican House member, Rep. Don Bacon, has already floated the idea of power-sharing with Democrats.__** **_THIS WOULD BE HUGE. We could get legislation we want put on the House floor this way, to then be ratified by the Senate and signed by Joe Biden. _**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Support the CA-13 count!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td5c671a5-f2c0-4093-a8ad-fdeab416e40b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_One of the races outstanding is California's 13th District. Liberal Democrat Adam Gray is leading conservative Republican, John Duarte, 50.3% to 49.7%. There are still about 30,000 votes left to count. In the areas left to count, there is very good reason to believe we'll pull this off over a Republican in Duarte, who has said he won't work with Democrats in Washington whom he sees as "socialists"_** **[We need this seat and can win it! Let's make sure Adam Gray has the funds necessary for staff& lawyers for what might be a two-week-long count in California. Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Adam Gray!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2795b334-5785-42ba-965e-bad7fb0921e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thanks Blue Amp Action Community!!**
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate Now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb382f723-690e-43f2-bec2-3aed8e1f79fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/adamgray-cacount9-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T16b898dc-4f87-4057-b942-aa5860a5e2c5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

Do you wake up in the morning with stiff joints or pain in your hips, back, knees or elbows? Then chances are you're feeling the effects of chronic inflammation taking its toll on your body.

The good news is that it is NEVER too late to help get this under control. And the best part is there are certain foods that help you do this naturally, without the need for prescriptions medications.

**3-Sec Quiz: What is the #1 Anti-inflammatory Food?**

A: [Turmeric](http://post.spmailtechnolo.com/f/a/jqgSkbKKiSHbH5sklIpZow~~/AARgdgA~-DYzhDaalSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55157807/380827915/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221127eom2_wm_od30ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzFhNjcwMy03MTZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDJkc1WJDDK85nFOaWsWx0m8_pO-sDc3Duzr8tQEFxg=)

Friends, I hope you had a very blessed, happy Thanksgiving! **[I’m reaching out because in just three days, our campaign faces our next end-of-month fundraising deadline on November 30.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55157808/380827916/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221127eom2_wm_od30ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzFhNjcwMy03MTZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDJkc1WJDDK85nFOaWsWx0m8_pO-sDc3Duzr8tQEFxg=)** I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why this matters. Right now, Aruna and I are assembling a hard-charging team of innovators who will address the challenges Maryland families are facing. These leaders are exceedingly competent, innovative, and will leave no one behind. **The countdown to our inauguration has begun, and we’re only 52 days away!** Aruna and I cannot wait to get to work for you in Annapolis to create a world-class public education system, create more opportunities for work, wages, and wealth, make our communities safer, give our state a 21st century public transit system, and so much more. **But once Aruna and I are sworn in and the legislative session begins, our campaign can no longer fundraise. This fundraising freeze lasts until the spring when session ends, which is why it’s so crucial we hit our goals between now and then.** Our next deadline is quickly approaching in just three days, and fundraising has slowed down since the excitement of the election has passed. But the November 8 election wasn’t the end to our work — it was only the beginning. **[Can I count on you to chip in $10 or more to help hit our November goal and support our people-powered movement for the long haul?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55157809/380827917/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221127eom2_wm_od30ds_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzFhNjcwMy03MTZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDJkc1WJDDK85nFOaWsWx0m8_pO-sDc3Duzr8tQEFxg=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Friends, I hope you had a very blessed, happy Thanksgiving! = I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why this matters. Right now, Aruna and I are assembling a hard-charging team of innovators who will address the challenges Maryland families are facing. These leaders are exceedingly competent, innovative, and will leave no one behind. The countdown to our inauguration has begun, and we’re only 52 days away! Aruna and I cannot wait to get to work for you in Annapolis to create a world-class public education system, create more opportunities for work, wages, and wealth, make our communities safer, give our state a 21st century public transit system, and so much more. But once Aruna and I are sworn in and the legislative session begins, our campaign can no longer fundraise. This fundraising freeze lasts until the spring when session ends, which is why it’s so crucial we hit our goals between now and then. Our next deadline is quickly approaching in just three days, and fundraising has slowed down since the excitement of the election has passed. But the November 8 election wasn’t the end to our work — it was only the beginning. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = = | = = I deeply appreciate anything you can give to refuel our resources and keep our campaign strong as we move closer to Inauguration Day. Elevate, Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor-Elect! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. name: Kari Lake
subject: My message to the People of Arizona & the United States:
body:
| [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxtkVFv2yAUhX-N_YYVLjbED37oFmUP7dZpk6b2KWLmxmYxxsE4lvPrB27aTuokhMR3zz0cuFhRzsuClwxYqirJ5RFVqivYAFAKgooN5JAx5NstSFSirEvgeZJv0EjdZZLO0jlrTVZbk7YV_KbIGNJScGCMiTw0Sp6zYFxKTmnaVa33w5iwuwT2YY1YTw6zWfcOVTQJ7CSdJp08ITlaR8LhansZ-C1UQcxicBxlg8QuQx2N2N5FI6f7JmE77yZMgBvb43IYOlQN_kMPdvC6fweTNweDSk8mMIeXsZXulY92cnVsfrloZR5dVMaUa0h5JY293Iq1NIPUTbT_GPdVY3uPvf-vZH0RmV2QHvpOqyD62jz_eCp_7rftClutwvftvud8KgbxkLpKDbPuOj1yEebSrHOJ0whJOn1cqkR8SgDWNoD14-H8PBs3_TH3X8gv-0jO_JspYhE-h90vA74pbybZOu5Ixe4v7uSy_g)
---

To the People of Arizona and of the United States:

A few weeks ago, Elections in Arizona officially started when Mail-In Ballots were sent out across our State. Election Day was just a few weeks ago, and Maricopa County is STILL counting ballots.

Printer problems, tabulation errors, 3-hour lines or longer, and confusing instructions given by election officials made this Election Day the most chaotic in Arizona's history.

Half of the Voting Centers that opened for the first time on Election Day (where the overwhelming majority of voters were voting for Kari Lake) were not operational or had significant failures.

Would you get on a plane if HALF of the engines didn't work? Would our friends in the media be able to broadcast their nightly propaganda if HALF of their studio equipment was not working? The 2022 General Election in Arizona was botched and broken beyond repair.

Thankfully, the Attorney General's office is demanding answers from Maricopa County. Attorney General Mark Brnovich is taking the first steps necessary to remedy this assault on our Democracy.

This isn't about Republicans or Democrats. This is about our sacred right to Vote, a right that many voters were, sadly, deprived of on November 8th. Tens of thousands have reached out, pleading with me to fight for them. Rest assured, I will. If we give up now, we will no longer have a Country.

Attorneys are working diligently to gather information, whistleblowers ARE coming forward, and the curtain is being lifted. Whether done accidentally or intentionally, it is clear that this Election was a debacle that destroyed any trust in our elections. Arizonans who chose to make their voice heard on Election Day shouldn't be disenfranchised or punished for choosing to vote in person. Yet they were.

I want you to know, Arizona, I will continue fighting until we restore confidence and faith in our elections.

| [**STAND WITH KARI LAKE** ](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxtkU9vnDAQxT8N3IxgADt74NBmlUht1T-XSjmtvPbAOsGYDCaIfPra7qap1EoIaX5-8_zgYVdxfmj5oYY6153kskedmw5KgKoCUYkSGihq5Dc3IFGLgzoAb7KmRCvNWMhqk0TO2UI5m1-6_ixUo3VdqvMZRdVi38i2L3kFpQyrOh-7i_fzktUfMrgLz4JqJSw2MxHqaBLYkyTDRvmErHfEwvDqJhn4NVTL7G5xWeSAzO2zikb1HUUjMtOQ1UdPK2bArZtwP80j6gH_oic3ezO9g9Xbk0VtVhsY4ctykfTGF7eSisu_L0rMI0VlTJlCylc2uJfroZJ2lmaI9v_GfdO4yePk_ytJX8Q2ClJp3ZpUdRum0zQaHYbb4ceDoE_YqwQvRoefefze8LWdxZecOj1vZhzNwkVoaUgtxW5CrtH0e5eJjxlAWgNINcDzw2ZpfbSf79lP940986-2jYdwG95-n_GP8mpSpPIjFcdfv1q46g)

clean_body: If you need somebody who will champion the concerns of hardworking families and work day and night so that all of us can win, here I am. Send me back to the Senate. | | Derek -- Expanding our Democratic Senate majority comes down to Georgia. That’s why, before Wednesday’s end-of-month deadline -- and before this critical runoff election -- With reproductive freedom and continued progress for workers and families on the line, the people of Georgia deserve a champion for the people. If you need somebody who will champion the concerns of hardworking families and work day and night so that all of us can win, here I am. Send me back to the Senate. My campaign has just nine days before the runoff election, and we need the resources to power our work. Grassroots donations are making a huge difference in this race. I need supporters like you to make your first donation of the year. Will you split a $10 contribution between my reelection campaign and the DNC to win in nine days and elect Democrats nationwide? With your support, we can call more voters, knock on more doors, and ensure the people of Georgia have their voices heard. We can all do this together, Derek. I know it’s a tough fight ahead, but we’ve won before, and we can win again. So, I'm once again counting on grassroots supporters like you to power this movement to victory in next month’s runoff: It's an honor to fight for you and beside you. We can’t give up now. Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. **Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1c48486d6a0c47b2b5af652102a64ca5&_e=qkXsrlQWCqfdZO4b-nG1nSfHG4sE7aITMtO6yaq-XBgINDk8OW_-5Pat1jlOUR7zTIipGqniC2NZjJFUVGVMM-lKS6R50qht2lyZq6KsfLgIWxJYpzjT40tgBzEVOmPmlU9MdKFkTF7kKk5PKOLmySGPRqQnM7NdmbKrBkyxRd0fm99CBp5GG2rxJD3tneSQ_TrU87qeluLzPbpVm-3prOUX8cbxbTrdW_fb2E-kJgXzF-cslMNZlmWJheMBawvzrpWpX0ukjJgXY-GV1i2bwWrpb47b3uvUr2QNbAzBnphIznL5ykXrK3UXVzd5sA8exTvz47dxjnhGKQ6nyFcCuZL4rKICLaTMwSIAOZHyvcb_bG_suYoNpuXB70ql0MFsvuC_JDJehuWm5NXp9GC1eGRbc4bVe-pgdyJg2boz82VYg5kg7rD5ZRmAjw4w5nz94FnnA9VIHq4181mnNbpSZHBGP0PyZDdVM17K1y84sxfcXdvAtVi1h5VhLZBkZeAb)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $5, $50, or even $500 right now.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1c48486d6a0c47b2b5af652102a64ca5&_e=qkXsrlQWCqfdZO4b-nG1nSfHG4sE7aITMtO6yaq-XBgINDk8OW_-5Pat1jlOUR7zTIipGqniC2NZjJFUVGVMM-lKS6R50qht2lyZq6KsfLgIWxJYpzjT40tgBzEVOmPmlU9MdKFkTF7kKk5PKOLmySGPRqQnM7NdmbKrBkyxRd0fm99CBp5GG2rxJD3tneSQ_TrU87qeluLzPbpVm-3prOUX8cbxbTrdW_fb2E-kJgXzF-cslMNZlmWJheMBawvzrpWpX0ukjJgXY-GV1i2bwWrpb47b3uvUr2QNbAzBnphIznL5ykXrK3UXVzd5sA8exTvz47dxjnhGKQ6nyFcCuZL4rKICLaTMwSIAOZHyvcafx4-vOlX1nPElo9-WthdxyDfSPHm3gegG4QeNYb0plg23VvWHGlc4bACnoV-rxggQrOIUE-5eodK-XldoG37EfJtzofCg_ImK1XyHzuMcSnxKe4MW6Mx9RUmHWZobNxxTunYe1SjAKxqFuBKtmajt)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: One hour left...
body:
And then the time has come...

| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
The time has come to mobilize, equip ourselves, and take clear and concise action.

**If you're:**
* Feeling disenfranchised by the current political climate
* Sick of feeling like political pawns stuck in a sick game
* Tired of being shadowbanned by big tech
* Ready to take action but don't know where to start
* Desiring focused interaction with other patriots
* Hungry for Constitutional knowledge
* Eager to hold elected officials accountable

Then you're not going to want to miss this livestream happening in just over an hour at 7:00pm, CST.

You can join me on either Facebook or YouTube.

For convenience, the YouTube livestream post can be found below.
[](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20lMkZ3YXRjaCUzRnYlM0RzOVVCRHhOaHhMVQ==&sig=9jK32BLR6coBkSfQZ7kqZ5zW2t7x72pCWaR4Si4iuBDq&iat=1669593508&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=115A137A1A940)
_For Liberty,_

If you're: Feeling disenfranchised by the current political climate Sick of feeling like political pawns stuck in a sick game Tired of being shadowbanned by big tech Ready to take action but don't know where to start Desiring focused interaction with other patriots Hungry for Constitutional knowledge * Eager to hold elected officials accountable Then you're not going to want to miss this livestream happening in just over an hour at 7:00pm, CST. You can join me on either Facebook or YouTube. For convenience, the YouTube livestream post can be found below. For Liberty, | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- • • Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Jameson Ellis For Congress, 206A S Loop 336 W #309, Conroe, TX 77304, United States

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=546532e9d9f443fba12bf04a4edd3869&_e=TUn9pEVhoUBT5JwuPUmZYQvMTrIurPsPEWP5m1NwH-p25s7ulChbCyRZ-dFSGmvB2Ts8WdDRSp7tbtoyEe6B9D_-BEmILLnP3GWBFgOI9CkT0X0cwIq9ozQ545frQjM1CDUUtTpO8XMgGoKU9Xg0r3rEA-jqIMz9eky8O3y7U2S4kHCEVv9A9taeOoO0xJT7p18Oh78JpZ1DSfbU_VgymI60dHESd8RD_5ewHlCkDddMZzhrYfKBbA4GS-WjqXlESARGNHGMgKx-Uep1SHVKUQKz32gQUBGfH3W9oNmBEOS_ODK8Yx7RImAdA03GgzNmRgYR_SwV2LZ05AWOKYU-hC8Ni8BZ_2DUem0gPQAzHl8uL4-kmCWNlfr5AJOvEed3ruog2S46D-nHbu6BA5KX-A%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=546532e9d9f443fba12bf04a4edd3869&_e=TUn9pEVhoUBT5JwuPUmZYQvMTrIurPsPEWP5m1NwH-p25s7ulChbCyRZ-dFSGmvB2Ts8WdDRSp7tbtoyEe6B9D_-BEmILLnP3GWBFgOI9CkT0X0cwIq9ozQ545frQjM1CDUUtTpO8XMgGoKU9Xg0r3rEA-jqIMz9eky8O3y7U2S4kHCEVv9A9taeOoO0xJT7p18Oh78JpZ1DSfbU_VgymI60dHESd8RD_5ewHlCkDddQaKdYE_RbBbPe8hJ_N9-zrvl9pI34CaEEwBNzfWYROnZw61IqEcqaQH0oFxghoPdUR0sCyOyiJFvM-iAa31K7pS5W0kI7NuwLw-gdGHfxDyuPsOhoGwHvhFMUwEDX4LcLCgn4tD6tyaSy-Fuk0fGBSos8RLCfqUghlDxa704mXw%3D%3D)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=546532e9d9f443fba12bf04a4edd3869&_e=TUn9pEVhoUBT5JwuPUmZYQvMTrIurPsPEWP5m1NwH-p25s7ulChbCyRZ-dFSGmvB2Ts8WdDRSp7tbtoyEe6B9D_-BEmILLnP3GWBFgOI9CkT0X0cwIq9ozQ545frQjM1CDUUtTpO8XMgGoKU9Xg0r3rEA-jqIMz9eky8O3y7U2S4kHCEVv9A9taeOoO0xJT7p18Oh78JpZ1DSfbU_VgymI60dHESd8RD_5ewHlCkDdfePNiWRhjk7mT_Eph566crYLqcRGE1jGuKsSkVp0ganGhLqfqxHrLxmziu-EsynbF5MraGrDbG8dO6Pl1TpKxmDgP-Y9nKroR2qC0NceZmpvfX_ghpop3vqlfCwUGNxeGQ0iK7hoy3gULe8_4L2ToBv4Bwis5Z_ce7ZrdIMp8P2A%3D%3D)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: The Battle for Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | |
We can't afford to lose in Georgia.

name: R. Warnock
subject: I'll be blunt:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation toward our crucial midnight fundraising goal so we can keep this Senate seat blue. **But first, let me explain why your donation _right now_ is so important – and what could happen to our bold agenda without it.**
I’m humbled to represent Georgia in the Senate as its first-ever Black senator. Growing up in public housing, my family was short on money but long on love and faith. Through hard work and the support of my community, I became the first in my family to graduate from college – and then, the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm fighting in the Senate to make sure every child __ can achieve their American dream.
**But with the results from the general election showing me narrowly leading Trump's handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker, I need your urgent grassroots support to win this crucial runoff election on Dec. 6:[Will you give $5 or more now – before tonight's critical fundraising deadline – to defend this seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55160948/380839141/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5071-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTJiZjU1Yi03ZDZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ZjuuIIlvsH2zroEQEqnAVBsdMz_TLQNleZTRySDFYY=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55160949/380839142/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5071-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTJiZjU1Yi03ZDZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ZjuuIIlvsH2zroEQEqnAVBsdMz_TLQNleZTRySDFYY=)
I'll be blunt: Experts are saying this runoff election will be incredibly close. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment are coming after me with everything they’ve got.
**Trump held megadonor fundraisers for my opponent, and McConnell is mobilizing his super PACs to spend MILLIONS to crush me and turn Georgia red.**
**I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so the only way I can fight back and win this race is with the support of every member of this grassroots team.[I'm personally asking: Will you give $5 or more right now so we can stay on track to hit our critical fundraising goal, keep Georgia blue, and defend this Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55160950/380839143/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5071-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTJiZjU1Yi03ZDZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ZjuuIIlvsH2zroEQEqnAVBsdMz_TLQNleZTRySDFYY=)**
Thank you. I deeply appreciate your support.
– Sen. Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Hi, friend, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.
Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election.
Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.
**But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight.** The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this.
**In a race this _neck and neck_ , every single grassroots contribution could mean the difference between winning and losing. [So please, friend, I'm personally asking: Will you rush $5 or more now – split between me and Kirsten Gillibrand – to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55178299/380863312/1384586616?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3802-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTA0NTQ0Mi1hODZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWGdfyl1sPBSDhnlZvaO8DrVsmq7dBeacO6zEx5DXso=)**

In a race this neck and neck , every single grassroots contribution could mean the difference between winning and losing. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Raphael Warnock and Kirsten Gillibrand: | | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for all your support, Rev. Raphael Warnock | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to . name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We have to show people what we stand for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re going to keep hope alive.
#
Peter,
Last Sunday, I joined the Sunday Show with Jonathan Capeheart to discuss our goals as progressives in the next Congress.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23493?refcode=em20221127-1891&t=1&akid=1891%2E420207%2Eoa30Lz)
As the minority party in the House — even if just by a few seats — our Progressive Caucus will have to work harder and smarter to fight for our agenda.
**I’ll share with you how we’re going to do that below, but first, I need your help:[Peter, can you donate $3 today to help build our progressive movement so we can fight back against whatever the Republicans throw at us?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23493?refcode=em20221127-1891&t=2&akid=1891%2E420207%2Eoa30Lz)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23493?refcode=em20221127-1891&t=21&akid=1891%2E420207%2Eoa30Lz)**
There are three things we’re going to need to do given Republican control of the House, Peter:
1. As an entire Democratic Party, we’re going to have to be a strong opposition party. Progressives are often the ones on the frontlines defending the communities that get attacked — whether it’s the LGBTQ+ community, folks of color, or young people across the country — and we must be prepared to fight back against GOP attacks.
2. As progressives, we’re going to have to work with the White House. We’ve built a very successful relationship with the President and with the White House on executive actions. Together, we must not only hold the line but make sure we continue to wield the power we do have and executive authority to move more lifesaving policies.
3. Most importantly, we are going to have to keep hope alive and show the pathway for people to turn out in 2024 so we can pass the rest of our Democratic agenda.

We accomplished so much of that agenda thanks to progressives in the last term, now we’ve got to get the rest of it done. I feel very confident that if we can inspire people and give people hope across the country, that we can make this happen.
But building this movement isn’t going to happen overnight — it’s going to take all of us standing up for what we believe in, fighting back against the GOP’s agenda of hate and fear, and holding Democratic leadership in the Senate and White House accountable.
[**To help us build this movement, Peter, will you donate $3 today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23493?refcode=em20221127-1891&t=22&akid=1891%2E420207%2Eoa30Lz)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221127-1891-footer&t=23&refcode2=1891_420207_oa30Lz&akid=1891%2E420207%2Eoa30Lz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=1891%2E420207%2Eoa30Lz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1891%2E420207%2Eoa30Lz)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress
