name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Giving Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Let's give more, together.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221127-3656-header&t=1&akid=3656%2E2526796%2EDdh5Sk)
As you recover from a week of Thanksgiving cooking, cleaning, or traveling, your inbox is probably filling with requests as the giving season begins. Many requests come from grassroots organizations that run _only_ with the support of their local community, and we hope you will give back to those that are important to you!
Alexandria and our team are launching a fundraiser for three community organizations — Make the Road NY, New Immigrant Community Empowerment (NICE), and City Island Rising — who provide food and support services to asylum seekers arriving in New York with nothing but the clothes on their back, including those sent from Texas as part of Gov. Greg Abbott’s anti-immigrant political stunt.
[If you’re able to lend a hand to these families in need this holiday season, 100% of your donation will go toward helping these three incredible organizations ramp up their relief efforts this holiday season. If you can, let's celebrate giving more, together.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221127.4O6IsM&refcode=em20221127-3656-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3656%2E2526796%2EDdh5Sk)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221127.4O6IsM&refcode=em20221127-3656-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3656%2E2526796%2EDdh5Sk)**
**_100% of your contribution will be split between these three organizations:_**
* **New Immigrant Community Empowerment creates pathways to success and empowerment for essential immigrant workers, and provides critical services and resources to prevent worker exploitation and ensure workers' safety and rights are respected. As asylum seekers arrive looking for employment, NICE provides workforce development training, know-your-rights education, and safety training for work permits that might cost an asylum seeker hundreds of dollars to obtain privately.**

* **Make the Road NY** offers an array of education, health, and legal services for immigrant and working class communities in NYC. Make the Road has been meeting asylum seekers new to NY as they disembark at the bus station to offer supportive services like housing assistance referrals and case management, and to distribute prepaid cell phones, Metrocards to access public transit, and cash assistance.

* **City Island Rising** ’s goal is to strengthen the social and cultural fabric of New York’s diversity by leveraging community-driven solutions to city-wide problems. As more asylum seekers arrive in NYC, City Island Rising is operating a food pantry and clothing drives to support migrant families that came here with little to nothing while they await immigration hearings.

We’ve seen this movement step up to achieve incredible things before. **Just last year, together we raised $7.36 million for mutual aid groups and other relief programs, and we need your help to continue to provide urgent relief to those in need — especially during the holidays.**
[If you are able to donate, please pitch in $3 — or whatever you can afford — and your donation will be automatically split between these three organizations working to build power for local working class and immigrant communities.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221127.4O6IsM&refcode=em20221127-3656-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3656%2E2526796%2EDdh5Sk)
Wishing you and your loved ones a happy holiday season.
— Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221127?refcode=em20221127-3656-P_FND_CHA_MIS&t=23&refcode2=3656_2526796_Ddh5Sk&akid=3656%2E2526796%2EDdh5Sk)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221127-3656-P_FND_CHA_MIS&t=24&akid=3656%2E2526796%2EDdh5Sk)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=3656%2E2526796%2EDdh5Sk) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=3656%2E2526796%2EDdh5Sk) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=3656%2E2526796%2EDdh5Sk)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=3656%2E2526796%2EDdh5Sk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=3656%2E2526796%2EDdh5Sk)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d1ffeedf6534cbdb34779ec0e544fc5&_e=vx4T_v30v2WE4YFKJITKs5MXCwun_EgaUgfF2rRbNlhb38JSYoSVa_HZQbOPTFM0qlXI-x9ABw7t0Q9CgRsTi5hMH0k8P6IeZkDBVfW4eRWxG1ZAg6B7Tpu_4USpdbxpqGEMDxbGqypbwFbIKzFwufh-WE5XjbDq06BMFPnEkySOrJYaeCgeNte2b1ILtdwA1BgTxpWIhfv3cdjBdOZkcunAC8XC7u71ZZK-UMahHQpcBJ1KInqNL8eSU4qazS3w54IWruNtN0q0KDPlfOMyDWph6oFHByyG338_fgwtHPExCXsKYNNQ2rkny-D0b8aI)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d1ffeedf6534cbdb34779ec0e544fc5&_e=vx4T_v30v2WE4YFKJITKs5MXCwun_EgaUgfF2rRbNlhb38JSYoSVa_HZQbOPTFM0qlXI-x9ABw7t0Q9CgRsTi5hMH0k8P6IeZkDBVfW4eRWxG1ZAg6B7Tpu_4USpdbxpqGEMDxbGqypbwFbIKzFwufh-WE5XjbDq06BMFPnEkyRB04113rKNJpOgEy-1ZTUzzY72mePjRVsr_rYEjkYriEwH8L7z3szyR9oBL0LtKDqnuIC-a0Q-OTxCt7yiTep54nTl32dZ9l_hoJo43wtijQVSMg4RF_0CuDOWaf8sKKcAH7m4pQcfuEoReU1rMyg6)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d1ffeedf6534cbdb34779ec0e544fc5&_e=vx4T_v30v2WE4YFKJITKs5MXCwun_EgaUgfF2rRbNlhb38JSYoSVa_HZQbOPTFM0qlXI-x9ABw7t0Q9CgRsTi5hMH0k8P6IeZkDBVfW4eRWxG1ZAg6B7Tpu_4USpdbxpqGEMDxbGqypbwFbIKzFwufh-WE5XjbDq06BMFPnEkyQwVsECsikyrQNXD82NI5N_eCq8C1bso8vnHpI5MoNEpeRey-EI-3JYrjeMwZ6e82GnCiW5bDL92e6rAGIAjih1WJJRNfwrTpugJ3dbvb96oQ7ocT_IQUYU2xekFcwYpRTOjzVNtlHNzc8lzOHz7Ns0)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d1ffeedf6534cbdb34779ec0e544fc5&_e=vx4T_v30v2WE4YFKJITKs5MXCwun_EgaUgfF2rRbNlhb38JSYoSVa_HZQbOPTFM0qlXI-x9ABw7t0Q9CgRsTi5hMH0k8P6IeZkDBVfW4eRWxG1ZAg6B7Tpu_4USpdbxpqGEMDxbGqypbwFbIKzFwufh-WE5XjbDq06BMFPnEkySd4nz3GwZA2ImynMa9UxbRgREjBFFWjuRcjoiEUTXDl00LvJZP-d7baUmf_EaJ3yTqujsaEmI0Qn35iwoKFVabzVIj5Zk5Ql1ikUQ8myAHVV2SKwyibVCSjFbwIGibSNpNL8uQP0x2tJoEJK0W5B-L)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970536:J8vM-bGuN:m:1:3331703221:146B4600A805401CC06D9043704B843B:r)**

[** Chip in before Midnight -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970536:J8vM-bGuN:m:1:3331703221:146B4600A805401CC06D9043704B843B:r)
We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. **[If every person reading this email right now would send in just $25, we'd easily hit our goal.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970536:J8vM-bGuN:m:1:3331703221:146B4600A805401CC06D9043704B843B:r)**

**[So Peter, I'm personally asking you today to chip in $25 or even $34 to my campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so that we win this critical runoff!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970536:J8vM-bGuN:m:1:3331703221:146B4600A805401CC06D9043704B843B:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970536:J8vM-bGuN:m:1:3331703221:146B4600A805401CC06D9043704B843B:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970536:J8vM-bGuN:m:1:3331703221:146B4600A805401CC06D9043704B843B:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970537:J8vM-bGuN:m:1:3331703221:146B4600A805401CC06D9043704B843B:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970538:J8vM-bGuN:m:1:3331703221:146B4600A805401CC06D9043704B843B:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970539:J8vM-bGuN:m:1:3331703221:146B4600A805401CC06D9043704B843B:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970540:J8vM-bGuN:m:1:3331703221:146B4600A805401CC06D9043704B843B:r)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Early voting in Georgia’s Senate runoff began yesterday. We want to make as many calls, knock on as many doors, get as many Warnock supporters to the polls as possible to hold onto this crucially important Senate seat. Can you help us shift the political landscape dramatically in favor of Joe Biden’s agenda?
body:
voting started yesterday
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T606fe415-a63f-4151-951d-2c9986a7aba8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_Yesterday was the beginning of early voting in Georgia so we can return Senator Warnock to Washington! Can you rush $5 to the Warnock campaign to get five more voters to the polls in Georgia?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T14be7eb5-08f3-44a0-b740-ed88084cfd50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Yesterday, early voting started in this critical Senate race. We want to make as many calls, knock on as many doors, get as many Warnock supporters to the polls as possible to hold onto this crucially important Senate seat. _** **_Healthcare, abortion rights, further action on regulating guns, paid family & medical leave, a $15 min wage & preventing a potential climate catastrophe are just some of the many issues on the ballot in Georgia. _** **_We must get his back--first, make a plan to vote right away if you live in Georgia!-- by rushing him the resources to turn out voters once the early voting period begins. As we told you previously, it costs .98 to vote in Georgia. Our goal today is to start the early voting period with a bang by getting Senator Warnock $5,000 to turn out over 5,000 voters!_**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Yes, I want to help get voters to the polls in Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70195988-21ae-415f-9bfc-9a9e71d580b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | This election could secure the Democratic majority and keep the grandstanding Sen. Joe Manchin from interfering with Joe Biden’s agenda. Again, our goal today is to start the early voting period with a bang by getting Senator Warnock $5,000 to turn out over 5,000 voters! **_Your support is so important right now, because Raphael Warnock isn’t calling up big, corporate lobbyists to help him fight off everything the Republicans have left. He’s asking ordinary citizens, regular voters, working families, to support his campaign and his vision of a better country for all of us._** **_This is our chance to come together and make all the hard work pay off even bigger. This is our chance to shift the political landscape dramatically in favor of Joe Biden’s agenda to help American families._** [**_Can you join us in rushing Senator Warnock $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so he can bank early votes and put this race out of reach for Republicans--like Herschel Walker--who'll try to cheat and overturn a loss?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ca658fc-0eaa-4e0b-bd8d-c50b6476adb7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thanks so much BlueAmp Community. We're so close to the finish line.** Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Peter: Conservative star Herschel Walker and woke, socialist Senator Raphael Warnock are locked in a runoff election in Georgia.
After two years of grueling campaigning, Herschel has to keep fighting. _**And so do we!**_
**[Please contribute to Herschel Walker's campaign!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970479:Jj8F-bGNc:m:1:3317145305:E149404885F8D673B16B52627E5ACA85:r)**
The Georgia Senate runoff election will be on December 6, so we don't have much time. The entire Democrat Party, the media, and woke corporations will be pouring money and propaganda into this race.
Herschel Walker doesn't have Wall Street, Silicon Valley, and the Swamp. His campaign can only rely on two things now: _**conservative principles and us.**_
The marathon of the 2022 elections is now a sprint for Georgia.
Herschel Walker is ready for this fight. He is giving everything he's got to save America from another two years of anti-American corruption in Washington. What is it worth... ▶︎ To fight inflation?
▶︎ To drill more oil and natural gas?
▶︎ To protect our daughters from woke extremists?
▶︎ To rescue our classrooms from racist indoctrination?
▶︎ To secure our border?
▶︎ To clean up our streets?
**[Please send $5, $10, $25, or more to Herschel Walker's campaign to build a conservative Senate.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970479:Jj8F-bGNc:m:1:3317145305:E149404885F8D673B16B52627E5ACA85:r)**
We need principled fighters in the Senate, not more spineless and feckless RINOs. Together, we can help send Herschel Walker to Washington to fight for our values.
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to support strong candidates. Sincerely,

Jenny Beth Martin is a special guest on Huckabee this weekend to talk about our new film _Innovation Race_. As the Executive Producer for _Innovation Race_ , Jenny Beth details the importance of restoring the patent system in America, not only to protect individual inventors but also to continue the spark of innovation that America has led for the past two plus centuries. The recording first aired last night on TBN and will air again tonight at 10pm ET/9pm CT tonight. **BREAKING: Raphael Warnock Raised $52 Million**
Peter, that's how much our Democrat opponent raised in the final days of the general election and beginning of the runoff.

**That's a lot of money. He _significantly_ outraised us.**

**Warnock has raised over $153 million for this election cycle!**

There are just 11 days left before the runoff election on Tuesday, December 6th, so we don't have a single hour to spare. We're calling on all conservatives to step up before it's too late. _**[Will you help us close the financial gap immediately?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61973621:J0HQKbGQN:m:1:3367311000:33F6F63D09F4649F0DF98F2CDFA68E7D:r)**_

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970560:67IwKbGrN:m:1:3253819041:182835DD94CEA344722B957250E042E2:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970561:67IwKbGrN:m:1:3253819041:182835DD94CEA344722B957250E042E2:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970560:67IwKbGrN:m:1:3253819041:182835DD94CEA344722B957250E042E2:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970561:67IwKbGrN:m:1:3253819041:182835DD94CEA344722B957250E042E2:r)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970560:67IwKbGrN:m:1:3253819041:182835DD94CEA344722B957250E042E2:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970560:67IwKbGrN:m:1:3253819041:182835DD94CEA344722B957250E042E2:r)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Two supporters from 18326
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We have just less than three days until our end of month deadline at
midnight on the 30th. But so far over the weekend, we’ve fallen behind in
reaching our $110,000 goal.

But the good news is if two folks from 18326 each contribute
$3 in response to this email, then we can get back on track
before the week starts tomorrow.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121963?refcode=em20221127-26275&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26275%2E1203867%2Ezu3i7j ]So Peter,
will you be one of the two folks from
18326 to make a $3 donation before midnight
tonight?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121963?refcode=em20221127-26275&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26275%2E1203867%2Ezu3i7j ]Contribute $3

We’ve had some incredible successes this cycle and helped our candidates
overcome millions of dollars in spending from right-wing super PACs — like
AIPAC.

And now we need to make sure we have the resources as we begin to prepare
for 2024 candidate recruitment because recruiting candidates and helping
their campaigns defeat entrenched incumbents takes major resources.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121963?refcode=em20221127-26275&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26275%2E1203867%2Ezu3i7j ]Please make your best gift today — to help us reach our fundraising
goal before midnight on November 30th.

Thank you so much for your support,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26275%2E1203867%2Ezu3i7j ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26275%2E1203867%2Ezu3i7j ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221127-26275-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26275_1203867_zu3i7j&akid=26275%2E1203867%2Ezu3i7j

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26275%2E1203867%2Ezu3i7j

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: 3X-Match Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams teamed up
body:
You won’t believe who teamed up in the fight against GOP-led voter suppression... | | |
---
| | You won’t believe who teamed up in the fight against GOP-led voter suppression: **Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams!** They’re doubling their power to _urge_ – together – that every single person who cares about our right to vote should join this fight. In their very FIRST public joint venture, Michelle Obama warned that Republicans are attacking our “freedom to vote, cast our ballots and have our votes counted” – and Stacey Abrams explained how these laws would unfairly impact “Black, Brown, young, and working-class voters, and voters with disabilities.” **Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams are drawing attention to this problem. Now, it’s our turn to do something about it.** **[_Take action today: Will you rush a $7 donation to elect state Democrats who will FIGHT for voting rights and help us reach our critical end-of-month fundraising goal? They’re doubling their power to urge – together – that every single person who cares about our right to vote should join this fight. In their very FIRST public joint venture, Michelle Obama warned that Republicans are attacking our “freedom to vote, cast our ballots and have our votes counted” – and Stacey Abrams explained how these laws would unfairly impact “Black, Brown, young, and working-class voters, and voters with disabilities.” Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams are drawing attention to this problem. name: Tamie Wilson
subject: folks, our fight for democracy is not over.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Tamie Wilson For US
body:
Friends, Jim Jordan does not belong in Congress. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tw-mncemail-default?refcode=221006_FR_whoiam-tw-RESEND2-ntl_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tw-mncemail-default?refcode=221006_FR_whoiam-tw-RESEND2-ntl_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Hi Friend,
We Deserve Better!
My name is Tamie Wilson. I am running for U.S. Congress to unseat Jim Jordan, so I can get things done and help all Americans LIVE BETTER.
As a woman, entrepreneur, single mother, and granddaughter of a WWII Veteran, I am a concerned American.
I am concerned about the future of America. There is too much hate, toxic, and divisive rhetoric in our country. The right constantly attacks Nancy Pelosi and look what happened to her husband. They vilified Gretchen Whitmer and then we hear there was a plan to kidnap her. Trump spread the big lie and then our Capitol was attacked. We see how the GOP votes on issues. We see and hear their toxic rhetoric on the news and social media, and then we see the headlines. I don't think it was a coincidence the mass shooting at Club Q happened a few days after the GOP voted against codifying same sex marriage, do you?
Enough is enough!
Help me stop the chaos,
Help me replace Jim Jordan. He continuously attacks Joe Biden, women, minorities, teachers, unions, our middle-class workers, and the LGBTQ community.
We have real issues in America that need to be addressed, vs tax wasting revenge investigations.
I promise you this, I will not only bring respect and dignity to the seat, but I will put my heart and soul into creating and passing common sense legislation that will make America a better place for all.
EXPRESS DONATE to Tamie Wilson for Congress:
If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
$20.24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-1] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-1] $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-1] $1,000 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-1]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
It's time for positive change!
- Tamie
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/TWSignoff.jpg]
Tamie Wilson is the Democratic running to defeat Jim Jordan in Ohio's 4th Congressional District. As a lifelong Ohioan, a single mother, and an entrepreneur from a working-class background, Tamie understands the challenges that everyday Americans face. She's in this fight to be a voice for the voiceless and those left behind by ineffective leadership.
Pitch in today to help Tamie Wilson flip OH-04 blue! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tw-mncemail-default?refcode=221006_FR_whoiam-tw-RESEND2-ntl_BIOL1]

| | **[Nancy Pelosi made history as the first woman to lead the U.S. House of Representatives, so before she steps down, will you join us in saying thank you? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55176424/380854062/-1352363716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGI3MzIzYS05MDZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2OtVdoMoiDaLZDJ0OKp0z3_Fndp5r2YnII7kiO38_LE=&emci=35c833d9-446b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=4db7323a-906e-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=5999589)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55176425/380854063/-1352363716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGI3MzIzYS05MDZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2OtVdoMoiDaLZDJ0OKp0z3_Fndp5r2YnII7kiO38_LE=&emci=35c833d9-446b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=4db7323a-906e-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=5999589) Speaker Pelosi became the highest-ranking woman in the history of U.S. politics when she took over the gavel as Speaker of the House in 2007. She was instrumental in passing the landmark Affordable Care Act in 2010, and played a significant role in repealing the discriminatory “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell” policy in 2011. Beyond her legislative accomplishments, Nancy Pelosi has inspired generations of Americans with more than 35 years of dedicated service and her tireless pursuit of a more perfect union. **Haley has been honored to serve alongside Speaker Pelosi since 2019, and now we’d like to join Haley in saying “Thank You” to one of the most influential leaders in U.S. history.** **[So please, will you sign our card to say thanks to Nancy Pelosi and show her how grateful we are for her decades of public service and historic accomplishments?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55176426/380854064/-1352363716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGI3MzIzYS05MDZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2OtVdoMoiDaLZDJ0OKp0z3_Fndp5r2YnII7kiO38_LE=&emci=35c833d9-446b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=4db7323a-906e-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=5999589)** | | | [Sign The Card →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55176427/380854065/-1352363716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGI3MzIzYS05MDZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2OtVdoMoiDaLZDJ0OKp0z3_Fndp5r2YnII7kiO38_LE=&emci=35c833d9-446b-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=4db7323a-906e-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=5999589)

clean_body: | = | | Speaker Pelosi became the highest-ranking woman in the history of U.S. politics when she took over the gavel as Speaker of the House in 2007. She was instrumental in passing the landmark Affordable Care Act in 2010, and played a significant role in repealing the discriminatory “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell” policy in 2011. Beyond her legislative accomplishments, Nancy Pelosi has inspired generations of Americans with more than 35 years of dedicated service and her tireless pursuit of a more perfect union. Haley has been honored to serve alongside Speaker Pelosi since 2019, and now we’d like to join Haley in saying “Thank You” to one of the most influential leaders in U.S. history. | | | Thank you for signing on! —Team Stevens | | = | If you'd like to support Haley Stevens for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55176575/380854652/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yzg1OGVlNS05MTZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u8_nj_F65W5rzXk11qg_wyhLPw1-aJTWOwnFxHuTA1Y=&emci=17b0c6ee-e66d-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9c858ee5-916e-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, we warned you that Georgia was going to be a close race, and we were right.

Back in October, we told you that Rev. Warnock was one point down – now he’s statistically TIED with his Trump-backed opponent. That’s far too close for comfort, and if we aren’t careful – if we don’t pour everything we have into this runoff – we could see Rev. Warnock’s MAGA opponent come out on top.

**_[We’re asking for your help right now. With early voting starting tomorrow we have to reach every single Georgia voter possible in the next 24 hours. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American😓
body:
| | | Dear Peter,[**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970300:6AQuHbGNd:m:1:3253819041:256162050C6E48C3F82673F30063703D:r) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.**Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI.Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans.[**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970300:6AQuHbGNd:m:1:3253819041:256162050C6E48C3F82673F30063703D:r) Now, I'll cut right to the chase.Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**.Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI.His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ "That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict.And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap.[**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970300:6AQuHbGNd:m:1:3253819041:256162050C6E48C3F82673F30063703D:r)The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970300:6AQuHbGNd:m:1:3253819041:256162050C6E48C3F82673F30063703D:r), before it's too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970300:6AQuHbGNd:m:1:3253819041:256162050C6E48C3F82673F30063703D:r)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide).[**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970300:6AQuHbGNd:m:1:3253819041:256162050C6E48C3F82673F30063703D:r)
---
| | |
---
[ Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970300:6AQuHbGNd:m:1:3253819041:256162050C6E48C3F82673F30063703D:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970301:6AQuHbGNd:m:1:3253819041:256162050C6E48C3F82673F30063703D:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606[privacy policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61970302:6AQuHbGNd:m:1:3253819041:256162050C6E48C3F82673F30063703D:r)
---

---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Georgia on our minds … because we’d rather look forward to Raphael Warnock’s principled voice in the Senate for the next six years, than expect to be clowned with by Joe Manchin and Herschel Walker
body:
51st Senate vote for Democrats
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6655e495-68da-43d5-938c-136ab44c8bf5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **[Split a $10 donation between Raphael Warnock’s re-election campaign and Blue Amp to keep this critical Senate vote in Democratic hands.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ac24107-08d4-43f8-b6f7-441b79d671ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **" Georgia, Georgia, the whole day through," as Ray Charles sang. ** **_Expanding our Democratic majority, re-electing Reverend Raphael Warnock--not a small man who misquotes the Bible to exclude, but a great man who quotes it to include. It is something you can appreciate whether you worship as Reverend Warnock does, differently or not at all. _** **_Because this is how Senator Warnock sees our world. He provides inspiration, sees the good in all of us and fights to improve challenges and eradicate suffering. Really, he's the very best of us._**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Warnock for Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T23ceb27c-db31-482b-a7c9-c6e4fa713fee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_This is why, again as Mr. Charles said, I have "Georgia on my mind."_ ** **[So, as we approach the election in nine days and a crucial Nov 30th fundraising deadline, will you rush Warnock's campaign $5, $10, $25, or more, to send this caring leader back to Washington?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c26847c-42b7-4da7-847c-2976af762a13/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) (As opposed to whatever you'd call that violent, misogynistic, failed marketing experiment Republicans call a Senate candidate?) ** **Thank you for continuing to fight for our democracy!**
---
Cliff

---
|
---

Fellow American,

**I'll be blunt: when I look at Georgia, I am worried.**

I'm worried because Raphael Warnock is on the verge of getting re-elected if we don't have Herschel Walker's back on December 6.

**We cannot afford to let the Left win another seat in the U.S. Senate.**

Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time. From crippling inflationary policies to woke ideology in the classroom and inept foreign policy abroad, their plan is taking us down the wrong path.

If we don't turn things around soon, the United States of America will no longer be the Shining City on a Hill.

We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. If we all wait for somebody else to step up, Herschel will lose due to a lack of resources - _plain and simple._

I'm worried because Raphael Warnock is on the verge of getting re-elected if we don't have Herschel Walker's back on December 6. We cannot afford to let the Left win another seat in the U.S. Senate. Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time. From crippling inflationary policies to woke ideology in the classroom and inept foreign policy abroad, their plan is taking us down the wrong path. If we don't turn things around soon, the United States of America will no longer be the Shining City on a Hill. We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. If we all wait for somebody else to step up, Herschel will lose due to a lack of resources - plain and simple. If you want to help flip the FINAL Senate race of the year from BLUE to RED, then stop what you're doing and make an immediate contribution RIGHT NOW. 100% of your contribution will go directly to Herschel Walker's Senate campaign to help him WIN on December 6. In times like these, there is no substitute for victory. This is your opportunity to help Herschel be the conservative fighter we need in Washington. Are you with me? We need to send a powerful message to the radical Left, so I want this email to hit Herschel's MASSIVE fundraising goal by midnight. Herschel is counting on you to help him flip the final Senate seat of 2022 and help Republicans hold onto 50 seats in the United States Senate. There is no room for complacency - liberty hangs in the balance of the actions you take right now. Thank you, Ron DeSantis Governor of Florida | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: KatiePorter.com
subject: What questions do you have for Katie Porter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
One of Katie’s priorities is connecting Americans with Congress.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15492%2E3422442%2ESOkxGL)
Katie wants to hear from you: **[what questions do you have for her?](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/submit-your-questions-kp/?source=EMAD28_ASK_20221127_V1_F&t=2&akid=15492%2E3422442%2ESOkxGL)**
**[Ask Katie ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/submit-your-questions-kp/?source=EMAD28_ASK_20221127_V1_F&t=3&akid=15492%2E3422442%2ESOkxGL)**
Whether it’s about what life is like as a Member of Congress or a question about a specific policy, she’ll be answering some of the submitted questions in an upcoming email.
As an elected official, one of Katie’s goals is to connect Americans with what’s going on in Washington, and explain the connection between policy (or sometimes a lack of policy) and day to day life. Answering questions directly from supporters helps her do just that.
**[Click here to submit your question, and Katie will get to as many as she can.](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/submit-your-questions-kp/?source=EMAD28_ASK_20221127_V1_F&t=4&akid=15492%2E3422442%2ESOkxGL)**
Team Porter

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=5&akid=15492%2E3422442%2ESOkxGL)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=15492%2E3422442%2ESOkxGL).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

clean_body: Sign Nancy Pelosi's Farewell Card now | | | | | | | | | | Friend, Well it’s official. Nancy Pelosi will no longer be Speaker of the House and is not seeking reelection for Democrat party leadership. Now it’s time to get to work. The House GOP has big plans to cut reckless spending, crush Biden’s America Last agenda, and investigate the shady Biden family business dealings in China and Ukraine. But first, I think we should honor Nancy Pelosi with a Farewell Card to let her know the American people are definitely NOT going to miss her. | | | | | | | | Nancy has always let us Conservatives know exactly what she thinks of us...Now let's return the favor while we watch her step down from leadership for the first time in decades. She’s pitted us against each other, used hate and division for her own political gain, and made millions while in office while the American people suffer from her Big Government Build Back Broke policies. This will be fun! Best regards, Andy Biggs Congressman, AZ-05 | | | | Paid for by Biggs for Congress
